events.description_en: An Iranian-aligned Iraqi Shia militia, operating under the decentralized command of the Islamic Resistance in Iraq, successfully launched a Fateh-110 class short-range ballistic missile (SRBM) that struck the perimeter of the Muwaffaq Salti Air Base in Jordan. This highly strategic installation serves as a critical logistical and aerial refueling hub for US and coalition combat aircraft operating in the Syrian and Iraqi theaters. While US Patriot PAC-3 batteries are deployed in the region, the SRBMâs depressed trajectory and high terminal velocity allowed it to bypass localized point defenses, resulting in moderate structural damage to hardened aircraft shelters and tarmac infrastructure. This kinetic strike represents a severe escalation in the proxy network's horizontal strategy, explicitly targeting a sovereign Arab nation hosting Western military assets. By drawing Jordan directly into the line of fire, the Axis of Resistance seeks to maximize regional geopolitical friction, aiming to destabilize pro-Western governments and fracture the logistical architecture required by CENTCOM to sustain Operation Epic Fury's high operational tempo.
events.description_ko: Proxy SRBM Strikes US Logistics Hub in Jordan. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: OPEC+ Declares Force Majeure on Global Oil Deliveries
events.title_ko: OPEC+, 글로벌 석유 공급 불가항력 선언
events.description_en: During a highly irregular emergency session in Vienna, the Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries and its allies (OPEC+) formally declared a state of force majeure on specific, high-volume global oil delivery contracts. This unprecedented macroeconomic maneuver was directly precipitated by the sustained kinetic closure of the Strait of Hormuz and the systematic destruction of Iran's Kharg Island export terminal by coalition forces. The declaration legally absolves member states from fulfilling contractual supply obligations due to the catastrophic, uncontrollable military escalation dominating the Persian Gulf. This geopolitical posturing instantly triggered historic volatility in global energy markets, sending crude prices to unprecedented highs and guaranteeing a severe, protracted inflationary shock to the global economy. By formalizing the disruption of the international energy supply chain, OPEC+ inadvertently amplified the secondary, non-kinetic objectives of Operation Epic Fury, weaponizing the economic fallout to paralyze global trade networks and explicitly demonstrating the extreme vulnerability of the international system to high-intensity, state-on-state conventional warfare in the Middle East.
events.description_ko: OPEC+ Declares Force Majeure on Global Oil Deliveries. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Coalition Strikes Houthi C2 Nodes Operating in Civilian Infrastructure
events.title_ko: 연합군, 후티 민간시설 내 지휘소 타격
events.description_en: US Navy F/A-18 Super Hornets and EA-18G Growlers executed a concentrated wave of precision strikes targeting newly identified Houthi command-and-control (C2) nodes deeply embedded within civilian infrastructure in the Yemeni capital of Sana'a. Utilizing advanced signals intelligence (SIGINT) to geolocate active proxy communication hubs, coalition aircraft deployed low-yield, precision-guided munitions (PGMs) to surgically neutralize the targets while attempting to minimize collateral damage. The Houthis have deliberately adopted a strategy of co-locating strategic military assets, including drone assembly workshops and ballistic missile telemetry centers, within densely populated urban environments. This human shielding tactic forces the coalition into a highly complex operational dilemma, requiring meticulous target verification to degrade the group's maritime interdiction capabilities without triggering mass civilian casualty events. The continuous requirement to conduct high-risk urban strikes highlights the persistent resilience of the Houthi movement and the immense difficulty of permanently severing their operational capacity to threaten the Red Sea maritime corridor, despite facing the overwhelming technological superiority of Western airpower.
events.description_ko: Coalition Strikes Houthi C2 Nodes Operating in Civilian Infrastructure. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: German Frigate Repels Houthi ASBM Attack on Escort Flotilla
events.description_en: The German Navy Sachsen-class frigate Hessen, operating under the mandate of a multinational European maritime protection task force, successfully repelled a complex anti-ship ballistic missile (ASBM) attack initiated by Houthi forces in the Gulf of Aden. The frigate's advanced SMART-L long-range radar detected the inbound supersonic projectile, allowing the crew to rapidly deploy SM-2 interceptors to achieve an exo-atmospheric kinetic kill, shielding a vulnerable convoy of critical supply vessels. This engagement marks a continuing escalation in the intensity of the Houthi maritime interdiction campaign, demonstrating their willingness to directly target and engage heavily armed European surface combatants. The persistent utilization of advanced ASBM technology by a non-state actor fundamentally alters the naval threat environment, requiring continuous, high-alert air defense operations that severely tax crew endurance and rapidly deplete the limited vertical launching system (VLS) magazines of deployed European naval assets. The sustained combat environment confirms that the Red Sea will remain entirely non-permissive for commercial shipping for the foreseeable future.
events.description_ko: German Frigate Repels Houthi ASBM Attack on Escort Flotilla. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Iraq Closes Airspace Following Unprecedented Proxy Missile Launches
events.description_en: In direct response to an unprecedented volume of unauthorized proxy missile and drone launches originating from its territory, the Iraqi Civil Aviation Authority issued an emergency directive indefinitely closing the entirety of Iraq's sovereign airspace to all commercial and non-military aviation. This drastic measure isolates the country from global transit networks and highlights the complete collapse of Baghdad's internal security apparatus. Iranian-aligned Shia militias have effectively hijacked Iraqi territory, utilizing it as a primary staging ground and launch vector to execute continuous, horizontal strikes against US installations in Syria and Jordan, as well as deep-strike missions into Israel. By closing the airspace, the Iraqi government acknowledges its inability to control the proxy factions operating within its borders, inadvertently providing the Axis of Resistance with a sanitized airspace to conduct unhindered kinetic operations. This closure further degrades the already crippled Middle Eastern civilian aviation architecture and solidifies Iraq's status as a primary, heavily contested battleground in the expanding regional war.
events.description_ko: Iraq Closes Airspace Following Unprecedented Proxy Missile Launches. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: USAF Targets Secondary Iranian C2 and Drone Manufacturing Hubs
events.title_ko: 미 공군, 이란 드론 공장 타격
events.description_en: Continuing the systematic dismantlement of Iran's military-industrial complex, United States Air Force F-35A Lightning II stealth fighters and F-15E Strike Eagles executed precision strikes against newly identified Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) command-and-control (C2) nodes and unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) manufacturing plants in the Bushehr province. Intelligence, Surveillance, and Reconnaissance (ISR) assets identified these facilities as critical nodes for assembling Shahed-series loitering munitions intended for rapid proliferation to regional proxies. By kinetically neutralizing these assembly lines, the coalition aims to induce severe logistical friction, artificially capping the Axis of Resistance's ability to sustain high-volume saturation attacks against Western and allied infrastructure. The strikes utilized advanced standoff munitions to minimize exposure to residual Iranian surface-to-air missile (SAM) networks. This continuous suppression strategy reflects a deep attritional doctrine, prioritizing the destruction of adversarial supply chains to physically exhaust the enemy's war-making capacity over time, ensuring that the decentralized proxy network cannot easily replenish its rapidly depleting munition stockpiles.
events.description_ko: USAF Targets Secondary Iranian C2 and Drone Manufacturing Hubs. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF 98th Division Secures Bridgeheads Across the Litani River
events.description_en: In a major operational escalation, elements of the Israel Defense Forces (IDF) 98th Paratroopers Division, heavily augmented by Combat Engineering Corps bulldozers and Merkava Mark IV tanks, successfully secured multiple tactical bridgeheads across the Litani River in southern Lebanon. This maneuver represents the deepest Israeli ground penetration since the 2006 Lebanon War. The strategic objective is to physically sever Hezbollah's primary north-south logistical arteries, isolating the proxy's forward-deployed Radwan forces currently engaged in fierce urban combat in sectors like Bint Jbeil and Nabatieh. The river crossing was preceded by intense artillery barrages and close air support (CAS) to suppress entrenched anti-tank guided missile (ATGM) teams. Despite achieving the crossing, IDF units continue to face severe friction from complex, pre-prepared subterranean ambushes and localized counterattacks. Establishing a permanent presence north of the Litani signals a definitive shift from localized border sanitization to a full-scale occupational campaign aimed at completely dismantling Hezbollah's military infrastructure in the region, ensuring a protracted, high-casualty ground war.
events.description_ko: IDF 98낙하산사단이 리타니강을 도하해 여러 교두보를 확보, 2006년 레바논전쟁 이후 가장 깊은 레바논 지상 침투를 달성했다.

events.title_en: WHO Issues Regional Health Warning Following Fordow Radiation Plumes
events.description_en: The World Health Organization (WHO), coordinating with the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA), issued a sweeping, high-urgency public health advisory for nations bordering the Persian Gulf and parts of Central Asia. The warning follows verified meteorological modeling indicating that airborne radioactive isotopes, released during the coalition's bunker-buster strikes on the Fordow Fuel Enrichment Plant, are dispersing across wider geographic vectors. The WHO directive mandates the immediate stockpiling of potassium iodide prophylactics and the implementation of stringent radiological monitoring protocols for agricultural and water resources. This development weaponizes the environmental consequences of the counter-proliferation campaign, triggering widespread civilian panic and immense diplomatic pressure on the US-Israeli coalition. Neighboring Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) states, already bracing for kinetic proxy retaliation, are now forced to mobilize national emergency management agencies to prepare for potential mass casualty CBRN (Chemical, Biological, Radiological, and Nuclear) events. The radiological dimension fundamentally alters the conflict's geopolitical calculus, potentially isolating the coalition from its European allies who view the environmental fallout as an unacceptable escalation.
events.description_ko: IAEA가 포르도 농축시설 인근에서 극도로 높은 방사성 동위원소 수치를 감지, 연합군의 벙커버스터 공격으로 격납 구조물이 파괴된 것을 확인했다.

events.title_en: Hezbollah Saturation Attack Penetrates Iron Dome, Striking Haifa Refineries
events.title_ko: 헤즈볼라, 아이언돔 돌파 하이파 정유시설 타격
events.description_en: Hezbollah executed its most sophisticated and highly synchronized saturation barrage of the conflict, launching over 400 unguided heavy rockets interspersed with precision-guided Fateh-110 ballistic missiles directly at the northern Israeli port city of Haifa. By utilizing varying launch trajectories and coordinated time-on-target profiles, the proxy force successfully oversaturated the local Iron Dome and David's Sling air defense processing capabilities. While the majority of projectiles were intercepted, several munitions penetrated the defensive screen, directly impacting critical petrochemical storage facilities and industrial zones adjacent to the port. The strikes triggered massive secondary explosions and massive hydrocarbon fires, forcing the evacuation of surrounding civilian sectors. This kinetic success demonstrates Hezbollah's retained capacity to inflict strategic, high-value damage deep within Israeli territory despite enduring weeks of relentless IAF bombardment and localized ground incursions. The attack achieves a critical psychological and economic objective for the Axis of Resistance, proving that Israel's multi-layered Integrated Air and Missile Defense (IAMD) architecture possesses finite magazine depth and can be temporarily defeated through sheer volume of fire.
events.description_ko: Hezbollah Saturation Attack Penetrates Iron Dome, Striking Haifa Refineries. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Patriot Batteries Neutralize Iraqi Militia Cruise Missiles
events.description_en: US Army Patriot Advanced Capability-3 (PAC-3) missile defense batteries stationed at the Harir Air Base in the Kurdistan Region of Iraq successfully intercepted a coordinated volley of three land-attack cruise missiles (LACMs). Radar telemetry confirmed the munitions were launched from western Iraq by Iranian-backed Shia militias aligned with the Islamic Resistance in Iraq. The cruise missiles utilized low-altitude, terrain-following flight profiles in a deliberate attempt to evade early warning radars and exploit localized blind spots in the coalition's air defense coverage. The successful kinetic kill by the PAC-3 interceptors prevented significant structural damage to vital US aviation assets and personnel housing. This engagement highlights the continuous, high-intensity horizontal escalation strategy employed by the IRGC's decentralized proxy network. By relentlessly targeting forward-deployed American forces with sophisticated, precision-guided weaponry, the Axis of Resistance aims to inflict unacceptable casualties and force a political reassessment in Washington regarding the long-term viability of sustaining Operation Epic Fury's regional force posture.
events.description_ko: Patriot Batteries Neutralize Iraqi Militia Cruise Missiles. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Kuwait Mandates Commercial Airspace Closure Amid Gulf Escalation
events.description_en: The Kuwaiti Directorate General of Civil Aviation issued an emergency Notice to Airmen (NOTAM), mandating the immediate and indefinite closure of Kuwait's sovereign airspace to all commercial passenger and cargo aviation. This severe protective measure was enacted in direct response to the escalating frequency of unacknowledged drone and ballistic missile transits occurring over the northern Persian Gulf, originating from both Iranian territory and proxy launch sites in southern Iraq. Kuwait's geographical proximity to the primary conflict zones makes it highly vulnerable to off-course munitions and the broader spillover of the US-Iranian kinetic exchange. By shutting down its airspace, Kuwait attempts to forcibly insulate its civilian infrastructure and aviation sectors from the rapidly expanding regional conflagration. This closure further degrades the already crippled Middle Eastern civilian aviation architecture, severing yet another critical logistical and economic transit corridor and demonstrating the profound, paralyzing effect of the multi-domain conflict on the daily operations of non-combatant Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) member states.
events.description_ko: Kuwait Mandates Commercial Airspace Closure Amid Gulf Escalation. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: US Cyber Command Initiates Offensive Operations Against IRGC Networks
events.description_en: In a significant expansion of the conflict into the digital domain, United States Cyber Command (USCYBERCOM) officially acknowledged the initiation of widespread, offensive cyber operations targeting the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps' (IRGC) secure communication networks and critical logistical databases. Utilizing highly classified zero-day exploits, US cyber operators aimed to disrupt the centralized coordination of Iran's decentralized proxy network, specifically targeting the digital infrastructure used to authorize ballistic missile launches and coordinate maritime swarm attacks. This non-kinetic line of effort is designed to induce severe operational friction, blinding Iranian commanders and preventing the rapid dissemination of tactical orders to field units. By integrating offensive cyber warfare with the ongoing strategic bombing campaign, the coalition seeks to achieve total spectrum dominance. This digital offensive also serves as a preemptive measure to neutralize anticipated Iranian retaliatory cyberattacks against Western financial institutions and critical infrastructure, acknowledging that the war has fully transcended physical boundaries into a high-stakes, multi-domain attritional conflict.
events.description_ko: US Cyber Command Initiates Offensive Operations Against IRGC Networks. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: US Carrier Strike Group Repels Coordinated Houthi USV and ASBM Swarm
events.title_ko: 미 항모전단, 후티 복합 공격 격퇴
events.description_en: The USS Abraham Lincoln Carrier Strike Group (CSG), operating in the central Red Sea, successfully repelled a highly complex, multi-vector attack initiated by Houthi forces in Yemen. The synchronized engagement involved the simultaneous deployment of four explosive-laden Unmanned Surface Vessels (USVs) and two Anti-Ship Ballistic Missiles (ASBMs). US Navy Arleigh Burke-class destroyers forming the CSG's defensive screen utilized a combination of SM-6 interceptors for exo-atmospheric kinetic kills against the ASBMs, while employing 5-inch naval guns and MH-60R Seahawk helicopters to kinetically neutralize the sea-skimming USVs before they could reach their targets. This sustained, high-intensity naval combat vividly illustrates the extreme tactical pressure exerted on coalition maritime assets tasked with maintaining localized sea denial. The Houthis' ability to continuously regenerate and launch sophisticated, multi-domain swarm tactics despite relentless coalition bombardment underscores the profound difficulty of eradicating a decentralized proxy force. It confirms that the Red Sea corridor remains a highly lethal, non-permissive combat zone, severely taxing US naval magazines and crew endurance.
events.description_ko: US Carrier Strike Group Repels Coordinated Houthi USV and ASBM Swarm. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Coalition Strikes Caspian Sea Logistics Nodes
events.description_en: In a significant geographic expansion of the strategic air campaign, US Air Force B-2 stealth bombers and Israeli F-35I Adirs executed long-range precision strikes against Iranian naval and logistical infrastructure situated at the Caspian Sea port of Bandar-e Anzali. This target set represents a critical operational pivot aimed at severing Tehran's only secure, non-contested maritime supply corridor. Coalition intelligence assessed an imminent risk of the Islamic Republic receiving advanced air defense components and loitering munition sub-assemblies from the Russian Federation via this inland maritime route. By kinetically neutralizing the port's heavy lift cranes, roll-on/roll-off (RO-RO) terminal facilities, and associated railhead infrastructure, the coalition intends to physically blockade Iranian military reconstitution efforts. This strike introduces profound geopolitical friction with Moscow, effectively challenging Russian freedom of navigation in a shared internal water body and signaling Washington's absolute zero-tolerance policy regarding the external resupply of the heavily degraded Iranian military apparatus during the ongoing attritional conflict.
events.description_ko: Coalition Strikes Caspian Sea Logistics Nodes. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF Armor Encounters Heavy EFP Ambushes Advancing on Jezzine
events.title_ko: IDF, 제즈닌 진격 중 EFP 매복 피해
events.description_en: Following the successful establishment of bridgeheads across the Litani River, elements of the IDF's 36th Armored Division initiated a northward push toward the strategic mountainous terrain of Jezzine. However, advancing mechanized columns were immediately engaged in a highly lethal, pre-planned kill zone constructed by Hezbollahâs elite Radwan Force. Proxy operatives utilized advanced, dual-axis explosively formed penetrators (EFPs) capable of defeating the Trophy active protection systems (APS) equipped on Israeli Merkava Mark IV tanks. The dense, topographically complex terrain heavily favored the defending proxy forces, negating the IDF's traditional advantages in armored maneuverability and line-of-sight targeting. This fierce tactical engagement resulted in the immobilization of several heavy armored platforms and necessitated high-risk, localized medical extraction operations under heavy suppressive fire. The friction encountered on the Jezzine axis highlights the grinding, casualty-intensive reality of the northern ground offensive. Hezbollahâs transition to sophisticated, defense-in-depth insurgency tactics guarantees that the IDFâs attempt to establish a sanitized, deep security buffer will require a protracted, high-attrition infantry campaign.
events.description_ko: IDF Armor Encounters Heavy EFP Ambushes Advancing on Jezzine. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Arrow 3 Intercepts First Suspected Iranian Hypersonic Glide Vehicle
events.title_ko: 애로우3, 이란 극초음속 무기 첫 요격
events.description_en: The Israeli Air Defense Array achieved a critical, unprecedented exo-atmospheric interception over the Eastern Mediterranean, utilizing the Arrow 3 system to neutralize what US Space Command telemetry identified as a Fattah-class Hypersonic Glide Vehicle (HGV). Launched from a deeply buried silo complex in central Iran, the HGV utilized a highly maneuverable, depressed trajectory designed specifically to defeat traditional ballistic missile defense radars by operating below their primary detection horizons. The projectile's terminal target was assessed to be the Nevatim Airbase in the Negev desert. This kinetic event marks a severe technological escalation in the conflict, confirming the IRGC's successful deployment of hypersonic weapon systems despite sustaining massive coalition bombardment. The successful interception validates the extreme technical efficacy of the Arrow 3 architecture but simultaneously underscores the razor-thin margin of error facing Israeli defenders. The introduction of highly maneuverable, hypersonic threats drastically compresses early warning timelines, forcing the coalition to exponentially increase its reliance on space-based infrared systems (SBIRS) and continuous combat air patrols to mitigate the evolving strategic threat matrix.
events.description_ko: Arrow 3 Intercepts First Suspected Iranian Hypersonic Glide Vehicle. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: EU Threatens Sanctions Over Counter-Nuclear Radiological Fallout
events.description_en: In a stark manifestation of fracturing coalition cohesion, the European Union's High Representative for Foreign Affairs issued a highly severe diplomatic ultimatum to Washington and Jerusalem, categorically demanding an immediate, permanent cessation of all bunker-buster strikes targeting Iranian nuclear infrastructure. This intense diplomatic posturing was directly catalyzed by the World Health Organization's confirmation of expanding radiological plumes originating from the breached Fordow facility. The EU statement explicitly threatened the immediate imposition of secondary economic sanctions and a total arms embargo against Israel if kinetic operations resulting in further environmental contamination continued. This development represents a massive strategic victory for Iran's asymmetric deterrence strategy, successfully utilizing the collateral environmental damage of the coalition's own campaign to politically isolate the United States from its traditional European allies. The diplomatic schism forces the White House into an acute geopolitical dilemma: either halt the counter-proliferation campaign and allow Iran to retain residual nuclear latency, or proceed unilaterally, risking a catastrophic rupture in the transatlantic alliance and the broader international rules-based order.
events.description_ko: EU Threatens Sanctions Over Counter-Nuclear Radiological Fallout. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Proxy Drone Penetrates Kuwaiti Airspace, Striking US Hangar
events.title_ko: 드론, 쿠웨이트 영공 침투 미군 격납고 타격
events.description_en: An Iranian-aligned Iraqi Shia militia successfully executed a complex, long-range drone strike that penetrated Kuwaiti sovereign airspace, impacting a localized logistics and maintenance hangar at the Ali Al Salem Air Base. The base serves as a primary logistical throughput node for US Central Command (CENTCOM) operations across the theater. The loitering munition, utilizing advanced radar-absorbent materials and terrain-masking waypoints, managed to bypass the base's localized Patriot PAC-3 and C-RAM defensive envelopes. The kinetic impact caused significant structural damage and destroyed several pallets of critical aviation spare parts, though no US personnel fatalities were reported. This strike represents a highly dangerous horizontal escalation, explicitly drawing Kuwait into the direct line of fire and demonstrating the proxy network's ability to persistently threaten rear-echelon coalition support hubs. By striking Ali Al Salem, the Axis of Resistance aims to degrade CENTCOM's operational endurance and impose unacceptable political friction on the Kuwaiti government, attempting to force the eviction of US logistical elements from the Persian Gulf periphery.
events.description_ko: Proxy Drone Penetrates Kuwaiti Airspace, Striking US Hangar. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Houthi Sabotage Teams Sever Submarine Telecommunications Cable
events.description_en: In a devastating expansion of the conflict into the non-kinetic, infrastructural domain, US Naval Intelligence confirmed that specialized Houthi maritime commando units successfully sabotaged and severed a critical segment of the AAE-1 (Asia-Africa-Europe 1) submarine telecommunications cable in the shallow waters of the Red Sea. Utilizing modified commercial diving equipment and localized explosive charges, the proxy force induced a massive disruption in global internet traffic and financial data routing between European and Asian markets. This asymmetrical maneuver bypasses the heavily defended airspace and surface domains, striking directly at the vulnerable, undefended lifelines of the global digital economy. The severing of the AAE-1 cable instantly triggered immense financial volatility, algorithmic trading disruptions, and severe data latency across multiple continents. By weaponizing the seabed infrastructure, the Houthis demonstrated a sophisticated evolution in their anti-access/area denial (A2/AD) strategy, successfully imposing catastrophic, worldwide economic costs that far exceed the tactical capabilities of their localized missile and drone arsenals, dramatically amplifying the global pressure to halt the coalition's campaign.
events.description_ko: Houthi Sabotage Teams Sever Submarine Telecommunications Cable. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IAF Decapitation Strike Eliminates IRGC-QF Syrian Liaison
events.title_ko: IAF, 시리아 IRGC 쿠드스군 지휘관 제거
events.description_en: Acting on time-sensitive signals intelligence (SIGINT), the Israeli Air Force (IAF) executed a precision decapitation strike targeting a heavily fortified residential compound in the affluent Mezzeh neighborhood of Damascus, Syria. The kinetic action, utilizing low-yield, precision-guided munitions launched from standoff ranges over the Golan Heights, successfully eliminated the newly appointed supreme commander of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Quds Force (IRGC-QF) Levant division. The targeted individual was actively coordinating the logistical resupply and tactical integration of Hezbollah, Iraqi militias, and Syrian proxy elements. This high-value targeted assassination is a critical component of Israel's "Campaign Between the Wars" doctrine, now operating at maximum intensity to systematically dismantle the Axis of Resistance's regional command architecture. By continuously decapitating the IRGC-QF leadership stationed in Syria, the IDF induces severe operational paralysis within the proxy network, disrupting the flow of advanced weaponry into Lebanon and preventing the synchronization of a unified, multi-front offensive against Israel's northern and eastern borders.
events.description_ko: IAF Decapitation Strike Eliminates IRGC-QF Syrian Liaison. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Royal Saudi Air Defense Intercepts Drone Swarm Targeting Jubail
events.description_en: Royal Saudi Air Defense Forces (RSADF) successfully intercepted a coordinated swarm of six Samad-3 extended-range loitering munitions over the Persian Gulf. The drones, launched from Houthi-controlled territory in Yemen, were programmed on a complex, dogleg trajectory intended to bypass southern Saudi radar coverage and strike the massive petrochemical and industrial hub of Jubail in the Eastern Province. Saudi Patriot PAC-3 batteries, operating in high-alert integration with US CENTCOM early warning architecture, achieved multiple kinetic kills before the munitions could penetrate the heavily populated industrial zone. This thwarted attack highlights the persistent, extreme vulnerability of critical global energy infrastructure to decentralized proxy operations. The Axis of Resistance continues its strategy of holding Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) economic centers hostage, attempting to inflict catastrophic damage on the Saudi economy as a means of coercing Riyadh into abandoning its tacit support for the US-Israeli coalition. The continuous requirement to defend these sprawling industrial complexes fundamentally locks Saudi military assets into a defensive, reactive posture.
events.description_ko: Royal Saudi Air Defense Intercepts Drone Swarm Targeting Jubail. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IAF Executes Deep Strike on IRGC Naval Aviation Facilities
events.description_en: Continuing the systematic degradation of Iranian force projection capabilities, the Israeli Air Force (IAF), utilizing mid-air refueling corridors over the Persian Gulf, executed a highly complex deep strike against Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy (IRGCN) aviation facilities near Bandar Abbas. The localized target package specifically focused on hardened hangars housing Mohajer-6 and Shahed-129 unmanned combat aerial vehicles (UCAVs) utilized for maritime reconnaissance and asymmetric surface attacks. By kinetically neutralizing these specialized aviation assets, the coalition aims to permanently blind the IRGCN's localized intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance (ISR) architecture, severely degrading its capacity to coordinate complex drone and fast-attack craft swarms against transiting Western naval vessels. This preemptive action serves as a critical force protection measure, ensuring that the remaining Iranian conventional forces cannot effectively contest localized sea control or exploit the operational chaos generated by the ongoing closure of the Strait of Hormuz.
events.description_ko: IAF Executes Deep Strike on IRGC Naval Aviation Facilities. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF Consolidates Positions on Jezzine High Ground Amid Heavy Friction
events.description_en: Elements of the IDF's 36th Armored Division, operating under intense close air support (CAS) umbrellas, managed to consolidate precarious tactical positions along the strategic mountainous ridges surrounding Jezzine in southern Lebanon. The localized advance was designed to secure overlooking fire control over Hezbollah's remaining logistical valleys. However, the consolidation phase was met with extreme kinetic friction. Hezbollahâs Radwan Force operatives executed a series of highly coordinated counter-attacks utilizing subterranean tunnel networks to bypass Israeli forward screens, employing dual-tandem anti-tank guided missiles (ATGMs) and heavy mortar barrages against stationary IDF staging areas. The intense urban and mountainous combat underscores the profound difficulty of the northern campaign. While the IDF seeks to establish a sanitized, permanent security buffer to protect northern Israeli settlements, Hezbollahâs deeply entrenched, decentralized infantry cells guarantee that any territorial hold requires continuous, casualty-intensive clearing operations, effectively locking significant Israeli ground assets into a protracted war of attrition.
events.description_ko: IDF Consolidates Positions on Jezzine High Ground Amid Heavy Friction. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: US Navy Conducts SEAD Strikes on Houthi Coastal Radar Arrays
events.title_ko: 미 해군, 후티 해안 레이더 제압
events.description_en: In direct response to the escalating Houthi threat matrix in the maritime domain, US Navy EA-18G Growlers and F/A-18 Super Hornets launched from the USS Abraham Lincoln executed concentrated Suppression of Enemy Air Defenses (SEAD) operations along the Yemeni coast near Al Hudaydah. Utilizing AGM-88G Advanced Anti-Radiation Guided Missiles (AARGM), coalition aircraft specifically targeted newly reconstituted Houthi early warning radars and surface-to-air missile (SAM) telemetry nodes. The operational objective is to systematically blind the proxy's localized targeting architecture, actively preventing the acquisition and illumination of coalition surface combatants and specialized salvage vessels operating in the Red Sea. Despite enduring weeks of intensive bombardment, the Houthis' ability to rapidly repair and camouflage these critical command-and-control (C2) nodes highlights their remarkable operational resilience. Continuous, cyclical SEAD sorties remain absolutely essential to maintain localized air superiority and mitigate the persistent anti-ship ballistic missile (ASBM) threat emanating from the heavily fortified Yemeni littoral zones.
events.description_ko: US Navy Conducts SEAD Strikes on Houthi Coastal Radar Arrays. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Proxy Ballistic Missiles Strike US Perimeter at Al Asad
events.title_ko: 이라크 민병대, 아사드 기지 탄도탄 타격
events.description_en: A coalition of Iranian-aligned Shia militias, operating under the Islamic Resistance in Iraq umbrella, launched a coordinated salvo of three Fateh-110 short-range ballistic missiles (SRBMs) targeting the US military garrison at Al Asad Airbase in western Iraq. Utilizing highly depressed launch trajectories to minimize early warning detection, the munitions challenged the base's localized Patriot PAC-3 defensive envelope. While two projectiles were successfully intercepted exo-atmospherically, one SRBM penetrated the defensive screen, impacting the outer perimeter of the installation. The kinetic strike caused moderate structural damage to perimeter security infrastructure and secondary logistical storage facilities, though it failed to impact primary aviation assets or personnel housing. This attack reiterates the Axis of Resistance's unwavering commitment to its horizontal escalation doctrine, persistently threatening forward-deployed American forces to impose continuous operational friction. The continuous expenditure of multi-million dollar interceptors against proxy-launched munitions fundamentally exacerbates the severe logistical strain on the coalition's theater-level air defense architecture.
events.description_ko: Proxy Ballistic Missiles Strike US Perimeter at Al Asad. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Pentagon Expedites Emergency Airlift of Interceptor Munitions
events.description_en: The United States Department of Defense officially announced the initiation of an emergency, high-priority strategic airlift designed to rapidly resupply critically depleted air defense magazines across the Middle Eastern theater. Utilizing C-17 Globemaster III heavy transport aircraft, the Pentagon commenced the expedited transfer of Patriot PAC-3 hit-to-kill interceptors, Terminal High Altitude Area Defense (THAAD) missiles, and SM-6 naval interceptors to strategic stockpiles in Israel and allied Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) states. This massive logistical maneuver explicitly acknowledges the severe, unsustainable burn rate of advanced defensive munitions caused by the Axis of Resistance's continuous, high-volume saturation attacks. By publicly announcing the airlift, Washington aims to reassure regional partners of its enduring commitment to the coalition's Integrated Air and Missile Defense (IAMD) umbrella. However, the necessity of an emergency resupply mere weeks into the conflict starkly highlights the profound economic and industrial asymmetry of the war, where multi-million dollar interceptors are continuously expended to neutralize relatively low-cost, mass-produced Iranian proxy munitions.
events.description_ko: Pentagon Expedites Emergency Airlift of Interceptor Munitions. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IAF Interdicts Strategic Weapons Convoy on Iraqi-Syrian Border
events.title_ko: IAF, 이라크-시리아 국경 무기 수송 차단
events.description_en: Utilizing advanced satellite imagery and real-time signals intelligence (SIGINT), the Israeli Air Force (IAF) executed a precision interdiction strike against a heavily armed logistical convoy crossing the Al-Qaim border checkpoint from Iraq into eastern Syria. The convoy, operated by the IRGC Quds Force, was assessed to be transporting critical sub-assemblies for precision-guided munitions (PGMs) and advanced anti-tank weapons intended for Hezbollah forces engaged in southern Lebanon. IAF F-15I Ra'am strike fighters utilized standoff weaponry to completely obliterate the transport vehicles, triggering massive secondary explosions that confirmed the presence of volatile high explosives. This kinetic engagement is a vital component of the IDF's theater-wide shaping operations, systematically severing the trans-regional land bridge utilized by Tehran to resupply its most capable proxy. By persistently choking off this logistical artery, the coalition forces Hezbollah to fight a high-intensity ground war utilizing only its pre-existing, rapidly depleting stockpiles, structurally limiting the proxy's long-term combat endurance.
events.description_ko: IAF Interdicts Strategic Weapons Convoy on Iraqi-Syrian Border. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Arrow 3 Achieves Exo-Atmospheric Kill Against Houthi MRBM
events.description_en: The Israeli Air Defense Array successfully engaged and destroyed an inbound medium-range ballistic missile (MRBM) utilizing the exo-atmospheric Arrow 3 interceptor system over the Red Sea. Launch telemetry rapidly confirmed the projectile originated from Houthi-controlled territory in northern Yemen, with a terminal trajectory programmed for the southern Israeli port city of Eilat. The successful kinetic kill prevented a potential mass casualty event within the heavily populated urban center. This interception further validates the extreme technical reliability of Israel's upper-tier defensive architecture against sophisticated, long-range ballistic threats. However, the continuous necessity to engage proxy-launched MRBMs from a theater located over 1,500 kilometers away demonstrates the profound strategic reach of the Iranian-supplied Axis of Resistance. The sustained Houthi bombardment campaign successfully achieves its secondary objective of forcing the IDF to permanently divert high-value strategic air defense assets away from the primary northern front and the direct Iranian threat vector.
events.description_ko: Arrow 3 Achieves Exo-Atmospheric Kill Against Houthi MRBM. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Oman Indefinitely Closes Airspace Due to Regional Kinetic Spillover
events.description_en: The Sultanate of Oman's Civil Aviation Authority issued an emergency Notice to Airmen (NOTAM), mandating the immediate, indefinite closure of its sovereign airspace and territorial waters to all commercial and non-authorized military transit. This severe, preemptive protective measure was enacted following multiple radar detections of stray ballistic munitions and loitering drones transiting the Gulf of Oman, originating from the intense kinetic exchanges between coalition naval forces and the IRGC in the Persian Gulf. By completely shutting down its airspace, Muscat essentially acknowledges the total collapse of regional maritime and aerospace security, attempting to forcibly insulate its domestic infrastructure from the rapidly expanding conflict envelope. This closure severs yet another critical, previously secure global transit corridor, further isolating the Arabian Peninsula and exacerbating the catastrophic logistical bottlenecks crippling the international aviation and maritime shipping industries due to Operation Epic Fury.
events.description_ko: Oman Indefinitely Closes Airspace Due to Regional Kinetic Spillover. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Coalition Destroys Reconstituted IRGC Aerospace Facilities
events.title_ko: 연합군, 이스파한 재건 항공우주 시설 파괴
events.description_en: At 01:00 UTC, a joint US-Israeli strike package, heavily reliant on stealth platforms and standoff munitions, executed a concentrated bombardment of Isfahan's industrial sector. The primary targets were heavily fortified, subterranean aerospace manufacturing facilities recently reconstituted by the IRGC to assemble Shahed-series loitering munitions and Fateh-class ballistic missiles. By employing a mix of GBU-57 Massive Ordnance Penetrators and precision-guided glide bombs, the coalition successfully collapsed several critical assembly nodes. This deep-rear interdiction is a core tenet of the coalition's attritional doctrine, aiming to physically sever the supply chain sustaining the Axis of Resistance's horizontal escalation strategy. The continuous degradation of Iran's sovereign military-industrial base permanently degrades its conventional deterrence and ensures that the heavily taxed proxy networks in Lebanon and Yemen cannot replenish their rapidly depleting munition stockpiles, structurally crippling the regime's capacity for protracted warfare.
events.description_ko: Coalition Destroys Reconstituted IRGC Aerospace Facilities. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF Initiates Mechanized Shaping Operations Near Sidon
events.description_en: Elements of the IDF's 36th Armored Division, operating in tandem with Shayetet 13 naval commandos, initiated aggressive mechanized shaping operations on the southern outskirts of Sidon, Lebanon. Following the consolidation of bridgeheads across the Litani River, this northward thrust aims to completely sever Hezbollahâs coastal logistical spine. The advance encountered immediate, high-intensity resistance from Hezbollah's Radwan Force, which utilized a sophisticated defense-in-depth architecture consisting of pre-registered mortar kill zones, dual-tandem ATGMs, and complex subterranean ambush points. The expansion of the ground offensive toward Sidon marks a significant escalation in the Levantine theater, demonstrating Israel's strategic commitment to permanently dismantling the proxy's operational depth. However, the severe friction encountered during these clearing operations highlights the massive attritional cost of urban warfare, forcing the IDF to expend significant human capital and armored resources to secure heavily fortified proxy strongholds.
events.description_ko: IDF Initiates Mechanized Shaping Operations Near Sidon. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Patriot PAC-3 Neutralizes SRBM Targeting Harir Air Base
events.description_en: US Army Patriot Advanced Capability-3 (PAC-3) missile defense batteries deployed at the Harir Air Base in the Kurdistan Region of Iraq successfully intercepted a Fateh-110 short-range ballistic missile (SRBM). Telemetry analysis confirmed the munition originated from an Iranian-aligned Shia militia stronghold in the Babil Governorate. The SRBM, utilizing a depressed trajectory designed to evade early warning radars, was kinetically neutralized in the exo-atmosphere, preventing a direct impact on crucial coalition aviation and logistical infrastructure. This engagement underscores the persistent, high-lethality threat environment facing forward-deployed US forces in the CENTCOM area of responsibility. The Axis of Resistance continues to utilize highly capable, precision-guided ballistic systems to impose continuous operational friction on American logistics nodes, forcing the United States to maintain an incredibly resource-intensive, multi-layered defensive posture that rapidly depletes high-value interceptor magazines.
events.description_ko: Patriot PAC-3 Neutralizes SRBM Targeting Harir Air Base. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: PLAN Deploys Naval Task Force for Contingency NEO
events.description_en: The People's Liberation Army Navy (PLAN) formally announced the deployment of a specialized naval task force to the Gulf of Oman, ostensibly to conduct Non-combatant Evacuation Operations (NEO) for Chinese nationals stranded in the region. The flotilla, which includes a Type 052D destroyer and a Type 071 amphibious transport dock, introduces a highly volatile great-power dynamic into the immediate conflict zone. While publicly framed as a humanitarian and consular mission, the deployment of advanced surface combatants to the periphery of the US-led maritime exclusion zone serves as a stark geopolitical signal. Beijing is actively demonstrating its blue-water force projection capabilities and its intent to secure its strategic energy and logistical interests in the Middle East independent of the US security umbrella. This posturing significantly complicates coalition naval operations, forcing US commanders to continuously monitor and deconflict with a peer-competitor's heavily armed maritime assets amid an already chaotic kinetic environment.
events.description_ko: PLAN Deploys Naval Task Force for Contingency NEO. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: USAF B-52s Execute Carpet Bombing on Houthi Tunnels
events.title_ko: 미 B-52, 후티 지하터널 대량 폭격
events.description_en: In a massive escalation of applied kinetic force, US Air Force B-52H Stratofortress strategic bombers executed a concentrated carpet-bombing campaign against sprawling Houthi subterranean logistical networks in the mountainous terrain surrounding Al Hudaydah. Utilizing dozens of precision-guided Joint Direct Attack Munitions (JDAMs), the bombers systematically collapsed vast stretches of reinforced tunnel infrastructure assessed to be housing anti-ship ballistic missiles (ASBMs) and explosive unmanned surface vessels (USVs). The deployment of the B-52, a strategic asset capable of delivering devastating payload volumes, signifies CENTCOM's determination to permanently break the Houthi maritime blockade of the Red Sea. This overwhelming application of airpower aims to physically obliterate the proxy's capacity to regenerate its coastal defense forces, though the reliance on heavy strategic bombardment underscores the failure of previous, more surgical strikes to effectively deter the deeply entrenched Yemeni militant group.
events.description_ko: USAF B-52s Execute Carpet Bombing on Houthi Tunnels. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Hezbollah Barrage Penetrates Northern Air Defenses
events.description_en: Hezbollah forces in Lebanon executed a highly synchronized, multi-vector saturation barrage targeting the northern Israeli port city of Haifa, successfully penetrating the localized Iron Dome and David's Sling air defense architectures. The proxy group utilized a combination of heavy unguided rockets to exhaust interceptor tubes, immediately followed by precision-guided Fateh-110 ballistic missiles. Several projectiles impacted the outer perimeter of Haifa's primary commercial port facility, causing moderate structural damage to logistics hubs and triggering localized fires. This successful strike vividly demonstrates Hezbollah's retained capacity to execute complex offensive operations and threaten vital Israeli economic infrastructure despite enduring massive territorial losses and continuous IAF bombardment. The attack exacerbates the severe strategic attrition rate of Israel's interceptor stockpile and validates the proxy's doctrine of utilizing overwhelming volume of fire to momentarily defeat highly sophisticated, multi-layered Western air defense systems.
events.description_ko: Hezbollah Barrage Penetrates Northern Air Defenses. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: US Destroyer Repels IRGC USV Swarm Attack
events.title_ko: 미 구축함, IRGC 무인선박 공격 격퇴
events.description_en: A US Navy Arleigh Burke-class destroyer, operating as the primary escort for a multinational salvage flotilla in the Strait of Hormuz, successfully repelled a coordinated attack by four Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy (IRGCN) explosive-laden Unmanned Surface Vessels (USVs). The autonomous, sea-skimming drones executed a complex swarm maneuver designed to overwhelm the destroyer's localized tracking radars. The vessel effectively utilized its 5-inch Mark 45 naval gun and close-in weapon systems (CIWS) to kinetically neutralize all four inbound threats at a safe standoff distance. This engagement confirms the IRGCN's continued reliance on asymmetric swarm tactics to contest localized sea control and disrupt efforts to clear the strategic waterway. The persistent maritime threat environment forces coalition naval assets to maintain absolute, 360-degree surface vigilance, severely taxing crew endurance and highlighting the immense difficulty of securing a highly contested maritime chokepoint against a decentralized, technologically adaptive adversary.
events.description_ko: US Destroyer Repels IRGC USV Swarm Attack. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Egypt Restricts Sinai Airspace Amid Red Sea Escalation
events.description_en: The Egyptian Ministry of Civil Aviation issued an emergency directive indefinitely restricting all commercial and non-essential military flight operations within the airspace over the Sinai Peninsula and the immediate Red Sea coastline. This preemptive security measure was enacted in direct response to the escalating intensity of the Houthi maritime interdiction campaign and the increasing frequency of US coalition airstrikes across the Red Sea corridor. Cairo's decision to close this highly trafficked sector of its sovereign airspace reflects profound strategic anxiety regarding the potential for kinetic spillover, including the risk of stray ballistic missiles or loitering munitions impacting Egyptian territory or civilian aviation. By restricting the airspace, Egypt attempts to insulate its critical tourism and logistics sectors from the rapidly expanding regional conflict, further degrading the Middle East's already crippled commercial aviation architecture and exacerbating global supply chain bottlenecks.
events.description_ko: Egypt Restricts Sinai Airspace Amid Red Sea Escalation. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Coalition Aircraft Hunt Dispersed IRGC Mobile TELs
events.title_ko: 연합군, 이란 동부 이동 발사대 추적
events.description_en: Transitioning from static infrastructure targeting, US and Israeli combat air patrols, supported by high-altitude RQ-4 Global Hawk surveillance drones, executed dynamic strikes against dispersed IRGC mobile ballistic missile Transporter Erector Launchers (TELs) in the expansive, rugged terrain of the Sistan and Baluchestan province. Intelligence assessments indicated that the IRGC had relocated its surviving medium-range ballistic missile (MRBM) inventory to remote eastern staging areas to preserve its second-strike capability. The continuous suppression of these mobile launch platforms requires immense, resource-intensive loitering capabilities and rapid kill-chain execution to kinetically neutralize the TELs before they can maneuver into concealed firing positions. This phase of the air campaign underscores the immense tactical difficulty of completely eradicating a technologically advanced, highly mobile missile force spread across a vast geographic expanse, forcing the coalition into a protracted, exhausting game of aerial interdiction to prevent further strategic bombardment of GCC and Israeli infrastructure.
events.description_ko: Coalition Aircraft Hunt Dispersed IRGC Mobile TELs. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF Armor Column Sustains Heavy Casualties in Complex VBIED Ambush
events.title_ko: IDF 기갑, 차량폭탄 매복 대규모 피해
events.description_en: Elements of the IDF's 36th Armored Division, conducting mechanized clearing operations on the southern approach to Sidon, sustained significant combat casualties after entering a pre-registered kill zone established by Hezbollah. The proxy force initiated a highly complex ambush utilizing a concealed, heavily armored Vehicle-Borne Improvised Explosive Device (VBIED), which detonated in close proximity to a Merkava Mark IV command tank, momentarily blinding localized active protection systems (APS). This massive detonation was immediately followed by a coordinated enfilade of dual-tandem Kornet ATGMs and heavy mortar fire from subterranean fighting positions. The engagement highlights a deadly evolution in Hezbollah's defensive doctrine, successfully integrating high-yield insurgent tactics with conventional anti-armor capabilities to stall the Israeli advance. The severe friction encountered on the Sidon axis vividly demonstrates the catastrophic attritional cost of extracting deeply entrenched proxy forces from complex urban terrain, effectively locking IDF maneuver elements into a grueling, casualty-intensive war of inches along the Lebanese coastline.
events.description_ko: IDF Armor Column Sustains Heavy Casualties in Complex VBIED Ambush. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Houthi ASBM Strikes Chinese-Flagged Bulk Carrier
events.description_en: In a catastrophic targeting error with profound geopolitical ramifications, Houthi forces in Yemen launched an Anti-Ship Ballistic Missile (ASBM) that successfully struck a Chinese-flagged, Beijing-owned bulk carrier transiting the Gulf of Aden. The vessel sustained critical structural damage to its superstructure, forcing an emergency distress protocol. Given the massive deployment of a People's Liberation Army Navy (PLAN) task force to the adjacent Gulf of Oman just 24 hours prior, this kinetic engagement instantly shatters the Houthis' operational narrative of exclusively targeting Western or Israeli-linked shipping. The strike demonstrates the inherent inaccuracy and systemic risk of utilizing high-velocity ballistic munitions in a congested maritime environment. By directly impacting a sovereign asset of the People's Republic of ChinaâIran's primary economic and diplomatic lifelineâthe Axis of Resistance has inadvertently triggered a massive geopolitical crisis, alienating a critical global power and introducing unprecedented volatility into the regional security architecture.
events.description_ko: Houthi ASBM Strikes Chinese-Flagged Bulk Carrier. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: C-RAM Defeats Drone Swarm Targeting Harir Air Base
events.description_en: US military personnel stationed at the Harir Air Base in the Kurdistan Region of Iraq successfully repelled a localized, low-altitude attack involving four Ababil-T loitering munitions. The drones, launched by Iranian-aligned Iraqi Shia militias, utilized terrain-masking flight profiles to approach the installation below the primary radar horizon of theater-level Patriot batteries. The base's localized Counter-Rocket, Artillery, and Mortar (C-RAM) Phalanx systems automatically engaged the threat matrix, unleashing a high-volume kinetic barrage that successfully shredded the inbound munitions at close range. This engagement highlights the relentless, daily operational friction imposed on forward-deployed American forces by the decentralized proxy network. The continuous necessity for localized point-defense operations forces US garrisons to maintain a high-alert, bunker-centric posture, severely degrading their capacity to conduct offensive or training operations while steadily depleting localized ammunition reserves against a highly resilient, asymmetric adversary.
events.description_ko: C-RAM Defeats Drone Swarm Targeting Harir Air Base. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: China Demands Immediate De-escalation Following Vessel Strike
events.description_en: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the People's Republic of China issued an exceptionally severe diplomatic demarche aimed explicitly at both the Houthi leadership in Sana'a and its primary sponsor in Tehran. Reacting to the ASBM strike on a Chinese-flagged bulk carrier, Beijing categorically demanded an immediate halt to all indiscriminate maritime attacks and threatened severe, unspecified economic countermeasures against the Islamic Republic if the safety of Chinese commercial and naval assets could not be absolutely guaranteed. This stark diplomatic posturing represents a massive strategic failure for the Iranian regime, which relies heavily on Chinese macroeconomic support and illicit oil purchases to circumvent Western sanctions. By threatening the core economic interests of a peer-competitor, the Axis of Resistance's horizontal escalation strategy has critically backfired, effectively weaponizing Beijing's immense geopolitical gravity against Tehran and significantly increasing the pressure on the IRGC to reign in its increasingly autonomous, decentralized proxy factions.
events.description_ko: China Demands Immediate De-escalation Following Vessel Strike. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IAF Strikes IRGC-QF Subterranean Weapons Cache Near Mezzeh
events.description_en: Acting on time-sensitive, cross-referenced signals intelligence (SIGINT), the Israeli Air Force (IAF) executed a precision standoff strike targeting a deeply buried subterranean weapons cache located in the vicinity of the Mezzeh military airport in Damascus, Syria. F-35I Adir stealth fighters utilized specialized earth-penetrating munitions to completely collapse the facility, which Israeli intelligence assessed was housing newly arrived guidance kits for precision-guided munitions (PGMs) intended for transfer to Hezbollah. This kinetic action is a continuation of Israel's relentless deep-rear interdiction campaign, specifically designed to exploit the operational chaos within the IRGC Quds Force (IRGC-QF) following the systematic decapitation of its Syrian liaison command structure. By persistently severing this trans-regional logistical artery, the IDF ensures that Hezbollah is forced to sustain its high-intensity urban combat in southern Lebanon utilizing a finite, rapidly depleting arsenal, systematically degrading the proxy's long-term warfighting capability.
events.description_ko: IAF Strikes IRGC-QF Subterranean Weapons Cache Near Mezzeh. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Hezbollah Precision Rocket Barrage Degrades Northern C2 Nodes
events.description_en: In a coordinated retaliatory effort demonstrating retained operational depth, Hezbollah forces launched a concentrated barrage of precision-guided Fateh-110 ballistic missiles directly targeting the immediate vicinity of the IDF Northern Command headquarters in Safed. While the David's Sling air defense system successfully intercepted the majority of the inbound threat matrix, the sheer volume and terminal velocity of the projectiles allowed a fraction to penetrate the localized defensive screen. The kinetic impacts caused severe structural damage to secondary communication arrays and localized power grid infrastructure, temporarily degrading the headquarters' command-and-control (C2) latency. This successful strike vividly confirms Hezbollah's strategic doctrine of prioritizing high-value military and administrative targets to impose operational friction on the IDF's decision-making cycle. The attack further highlights the extreme vulnerability of static, centralized C2 nodes to sustained precision bombardment, forcing the IDF to continuously expend strategic-tier interceptors to protect critical administrative infrastructure.
events.description_ko: Hezbollah Precision Rocket Barrage Degrades Northern C2 Nodes. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Bahrain Temporarily Closes Airspace Amid Rising Interception Debris Risks
events.description_en: The Bahraini Civil Aviation Affairs authority issued an emergency directive temporarily closing its sovereign airspace to all inbound and outbound commercial traffic. This preemptive security protocol was initiated due to the extremely high volume of exo-atmospheric interceptions occurring over the central Persian Gulf, as US Navy Aegis cruisers and Saudi Patriot batteries continuously engaged proxy-launched ballistic missiles originating from southern Iraq and Iran. The sheer density of kinetic engagements generated a massive, unpredictable debris field of shredded titanium, unexploded warheads, and highly toxic hypergolic propellants falling back into the lower atmosphere and territorial waters. By shutting down its airspace, Manama officially recognizes that the airspace above the GCC has transitioned into an active, highly lethal combat zone, attempting to insulate civilian aviation from the catastrophic risks associated with transiting beneath a continuous, high-intensity missile defense umbrella.
events.description_ko: Bahrain Temporarily Closes Airspace Amid Rising Interception Debris Risks. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: PLAN Task Force Enters Gulf of Aden Escorting Commercial Shipping
events.title_ko: 중국 해군, 아덴만 진입 상선 호위
events.description_en: At 03:15 UTC, the People's Liberation Army Navy (PLAN) Type 052D destroyer and its accompanying task force formally transited into the Gulf of Aden, initiating unilateral escort operations for Chinese-flagged commercial vessels. This highly aggressive naval posturing is a direct, unilateral response to the Houthi ASBM strike on a Beijing-owned bulk carrier the previous day. By deploying advanced surface combatants into the US-dominated maritime exclusion zone without coordinating with CENTCOM, China fundamentally challenges Washington's role as the sole guarantor of global maritime security. The PLAN task force established localized exclusion bubbles around Chinese shipping, explicitly warning both the Houthi proxy network and coalition naval aviation to maintain standoff distances. This introduces an extreme risk of tactical miscalculation, as US and Israeli strike packages must now dynamically deconflict their target acquisition algorithms to avoid inadvertently engaging peer-competitor military assets operating within the active combat theater.
events.description_ko: PLAN Task Force Enters Gulf of Aden Escorting Commercial Shipping. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IAF F-35s Execute Decapitation Strike on IRGCN Command Center
events.title_ko: IAF F-35, 반다르아바스 IRGC 지휘소 타격
events.description_en: The Israeli Air Force (IAF) executed a highly complex, extended-range decapitation strike targeting the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy (IRGCN) primary operational command center located within the heavily fortified Bandar Abbas naval complex. Utilizing a strike package of F-35I Adir stealth fighters supported by high-altitude electronic warfare platforms, the IAF penetrated dense Iranian coastal air defense networks to deliver multiple precision-guided bunker-buster munitions. The kinetic strike successfully collapsed the subterranean C2 node, resulting in the confirmed deaths of several senior IRGCN commanders responsible for coordinating asymmetric swarm attacks in the Strait of Hormuz. This deep-rear interdiction severely disrupts the IRGC's localized maritime command architecture, effectively blinding its surface forces and preempting planned swarm deployments against coalition salvage flotillas. However, the continuous necessity to conduct high-risk sorties over 1,500 kilometers from Israeli airspace highlights the extreme logistical and attritional strain placed on the IAF's limited fleet of fifth-generation stealth airframes.
events.description_ko: IAF F-35s Execute Decapitation Strike on IRGCN Command Center. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF Armor Advance Stalls Amid Massive Hezbollah ATGM Barrages
events.title_ko: IDF 기갑 진격, 헤즈볼라 대전차 공세에 저지
events.description_en: The Israel Defense Forces (IDF) mechanized advance toward the coastal city of Sidon effectively ground to a halt as leading elements of the 36th Armored Division encountered a massive, synchronized anti-armor ambush orchestrated by Hezbollahâs elite Radwan Force. As Israeli Merkava Mark IV columns navigated the restrictive coastal topography, proxy operatives initiated a coordinated enfilade utilizing dozens of dual-tandem Kornet anti-tank guided missiles (ATGMs) fired simultaneously from concealed subterranean kill zones. The sheer volume of incoming precision fire managed to saturate and momentarily defeat the localized Trophy active protection systems (APS), resulting in the catastrophic immobilization of multiple heavy armor platforms. This severe tactical friction demonstrates Hezbollah's successful transition into a dug-in, conventional defending army capable of imposing unacceptable attritional costs on advancing Israeli maneuver elements. The stall on the Sidon axis forces the IDF to pivot toward highly destructive, methodical artillery barrages to clear urban sectors, effectively ensuring a protracted, casualty-intensive stalemate in the southern Lebanese theater.
events.description_ko: IDF Armor Advance Stalls Amid Massive Hezbollah ATGM Barrages. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Iraqi Militia Drone Swarm Strikes Coalition Logistics Hub
events.title_ko: 이라크 민병대 드론, 에르빌 군수기지 타격
events.description_en: A decentralized coalition of Iranian-aligned Shia militias, operating under the Islamic Resistance in Iraq, executed a devastating, multi-vector drone swarm attack targeting a primary coalition logistical and contractor hub situated adjacent to the Erbil International Airport in the Kurdistan Region. Utilizing terrain-masking flight profiles and advanced loitering munitions equipped with localized jamming modules, the proxy force successfully bypassed the installation's localized C-RAM and Patriot PAC-3 defensive envelopes. The kinetic impacts triggered massive secondary explosions within fuel storage depots and contractor housing units, resulting in significant structural devastation and the confirmed deaths of twelve international logistical contractors. This highly lethal strike represents a critical success for the Axis of Resistance's horizontal escalation strategy, successfully bypassing multi-layered IAMD architectures to inflict severe casualties on the soft logistical underbelly of Operation Epic Fury. The attack exacerbates the political friction between Washington and Baghdad while demonstrating the proxies' enduring capacity for high-end precision strikes.
events.description_ko: Iraqi Militia Drone Swarm Strikes Coalition Logistics Hub. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: China Issues Ultimatum to Iran Over Red Sea Security Guarantees
events.title_ko: 중국, 이란에 홍해 안전 보장 최후통첩
events.description_en: In an unprecedented diplomatic maneuver that fundamentally fractured the geopolitical calculus of the conflict, the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the People's Republic of China issued a severe, closed-door ultimatum directly to the Iranian leadership in Tehran. Beijing categorically demanded that the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) utilize its centralized command authority to immediately and permanently halt all Houthi maritime interdiction operations in the Red Sea and Gulf of Aden. The demarche explicitly threatened the immediate suspension of all illicit Chinese purchases of Iranian crude oil and the freezing of critical macroeconomic lifelines if the safety of Chinese maritime assets could not be guaranteed. This development forces Tehran into an impossible strategic dilemma: either publicly capitulate to Beijing and forcibly restrain its most effective regional proxy, thereby undermining the foundational ideology of the Axis of Resistance, or face absolute economic annihilation by alienating its sole remaining great-power patron.
events.description_ko: China Issues Ultimatum to Iran Over Red Sea Security Guarantees. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Arrow 3 Intercepts Coordinated Ballistic Missile Salvo from Yemen
events.description_en: The Israeli Air Defense Array engaged in a massive, high-intensity exo-atmospheric interception sequence over the Red Sea, utilizing multiple Arrow 3 interceptors to neutralize a coordinated salvo of three medium-range ballistic missiles (MRBMs) launched from Houthi-controlled territory in Yemen. The ballistic projectiles, programmed on depressed trajectories aimed directly at the Tel Aviv metropolitan area, represented a significant escalation in the volume of long-range proxy fire. The successful kinetic kills prevented a catastrophic mass-casualty event within Israel's primary economic hub. However, this engagement starkly illustrates the profound, unsustainable economic asymmetry of the conflict. The Houthi ability to force the IDF to continuously expend rapidly depleting, multi-million-dollar strategic interceptors against relatively cheap, Iranian-supplied munitions perfectly executes the proxy network's overarching attritional doctrine. The continuous barrage confirms that despite relentless coalition bombardment of their subterranean launch sites, the Yemeni militants retain a highly potent, deeply entrenched strategic strike capability.
events.description_ko: Arrow 3 Intercepts Coordinated Ballistic Missile Salvo from Yemen. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: US Strategic Bombers Target Houthi Subterranean ASBM Caches
events.title_ko: 미 전략폭격기, 후티 지하 ASBM 격납고 타격
events.description_en: Responding to the sustained ballistic missile barrage targeting central Israel, United States Central Command (CENTCOM) ordered a massive, retaliatory wave of strategic bombardment against Houthi infrastructure in Yemen. US Air Force B-1B Lancer heavy bombers, deploying from forward operating bases in the Indian Ocean, executed concentrated strikes utilizing dozens of precision-guided Joint Direct Attack Munitions (JDAMs) to systematically collapse known subterranean weapons caches and assembly facilities located in the mountainous periphery of Sana'a. The heavy payload delivery aimed to physically obliterate the Houthis' capacity to regenerate their ASBM and extended-range drone inventories. However, the reliance on high-yield strategic bombers to neutralize localized proxy capabilities underscores the failure of the coalition's localized suppression efforts to definitively break the Yemeni militant group's operational resilience. The strikes effectively guarantee the indefinite continuation of a grueling, high-intensity air campaign over the Arabian Peninsula, heavily taxing US global strike assets.
events.description_ko: US Strategic Bombers Target Houthi Subterranean ASBM Caches. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Lebanon Formally Closes Airspace as IAF Bombardment Intensifies
events.description_en: The Lebanese Directorate General of Civil Aviation issued an emergency directive formally and indefinitely closing the entirety of Lebanon's sovereign airspace to all commercial passenger and cargo transit. This absolute closure was precipitated by the escalating intensity of the Israeli Air Force's (IAF) strategic bombardment campaign targeting Hezbollah infrastructure embedded deeply within the civilian sectors of Beirut, specifically the Dahiyeh suburb, as well as the Bekaa Valley. The rampant utilization of heavy bunker-buster munitions and continuous drone surveillance by coalition forces has transformed the Lebanese airspace into a highly lethal, non-permissive combat zone, rendering civilian aviation operations categorically impossible. By officially severing its primary aerial connection to the outside world, the Lebanese state effectively acknowledges its total loss of sovereignty and the total collapse of its domestic infrastructure, cementing the country's status as a primary, heavily devastated battleground in the expanding regional conflagration.
events.description_ko: Lebanon Formally Closes Airspace as IAF Bombardment Intensifies. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IRGC Commands Temporary Halt to Houthi Maritime Operations Following Chinese Ultimatum
events.title_ko: IRGC, 후티 해상 작전 일시 중단 명령
events.description_en: In a massive strategic concession dictated by extreme macroeconomic vulnerability, the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) Quds Force issued a binding directive ordering Ansar Allah (Houthi) leadership to immediately suspend all anti-ship ballistic missile (ASBM) and drone operations in the Red Sea and Gulf of Aden. This unprecedented operational stand-down is the direct result of Beijing's severe diplomatic ultimatum, which threatened to instantaneously freeze all illicit Chinese purchases of Iranian crude oil following the accidental strike on a Chinese-flagged vessel. Tehran's capitulation highlights the absolute fragility of its wartime economy and confirms that Chinese macroeconomic leverage supersedes the ideological objectives of the Axis of Resistance. The forced cessation of the maritime blockade provides immediate, critical relief to US Navy carrier strike groups and commercial shipping, fundamentally altering the theater's geometry. However, it severely damages the IRGC's internal credibility and demonstrates to its proxy network that Tehran will sacrifice localized operational momentum to ensure regime survival and maintain its sole great-power patronage.
events.description_ko: IRGC Commands Temporary Halt to Houthi Maritime Operations Following Chinese Ultimatum. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IAF Executes Scorched-Earth Campaign on Beqaa Valley Logistical Arteries
events.description_en: Capitalizing on the operational pause in the broader regional theater, the Israeli Air Force (IAF) redirected massive strategic air assets to execute a scorched-earth interdiction campaign across Lebanon's Beqaa Valley. Utilizing hundreds of precision-guided munitions, IAF F-15I Ra'am and F-16I Sufa squadrons systematically obliterated every primary and secondary transit route, bridge, and subterranean tunnel network connecting the Syrian border to Hezbollah's northern command infrastructure. This overwhelming application of kinetic force aims to achieve total operational isolation of the proxy group. By permanently severing the trans-regional land bridge, the IDF guarantees that Hezbollah cannot receive reinforcements, advanced anti-tank guided missiles (ATGMs), or replacement personnel from the IRGC Quds Force. This deliberate, systematic destruction of civilian and dual-use transit infrastructure ensures a catastrophic humanitarian and logistical bottleneck, mathematically condemning Hezbollah to fight the remainder of the high-intensity ground war utilizing only its rapidly depleting, isolated stockpiles.
events.description_ko: IAF Executes Scorched-Earth Campaign on Beqaa Valley Logistical Arteries. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF Breaks Stalemate at Sidon with Heavy Naval Gunfire Support
events.description_en: Following days of grueling, casualty-intensive urban combat, the Israel Defense Forces (IDF) 36th Armored Division successfully broke the tactical stalemate on the southern outskirts of Sidon. The breakthrough was achieved by heavily integrating close air support (CAS) with sustained, high-volume naval gunfire from Israeli Navy Sa'ar 6-class corvettes operating in the littoral zone. The continuous, heavy-caliber bombardment systematically neutralized Hezbollah's deeply entrenched anti-tank guided missile (ATGM) teams and collapsed the proxy's subterranean kill zones, creating a sanitized maneuver corridor for advancing Merkava Mark IV columns. Unable to withstand the concentrated, multi-domain firepower, elements of Hezbollah's elite Radwan Force initiated a disorganized, fighting withdrawal toward defensible lines north of the Awali River. This localized tactical victory is a critical operational milestone for the IDF, effectively collapsing Hezbollah's coastal defensive architecture and permanently degrading the proxy's ability to contest the vital north-south logistical arteries necessary for Israel to project sustained ground power deeper into Lebanon.
events.description_ko: IDF Breaks Stalemate at Sidon with Heavy Naval Gunfire Support. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Arrow 3 Defeats Desperate Iranian Ballistic Missile Salvo Targeting Nevatim
events.title_ko: 애로우3, 이란 탄도미사일 살보 전량 요격
events.description_en: In a desperate, centralized attempt to relieve the overwhelming kinetic pressure currently crushing Hezbollah in the Levantine theater, the remnants of the IRGC Aerospace Force launched a coordinated salvo of five medium-range ballistic missiles (MRBMs) directly from hardened silos in central Iran. Trajectory telemetry identified the primary target as the strategic Nevatim Airbase in the Negev Desert, which houses the IAF's F-35I Adir stealth fighter squadrons. The Israeli Air Defense Array achieved a flawless, 100% interception rate utilizing the exo-atmospheric Arrow 3 system. The successful kinetic kills, occurring high above the Earth's atmosphere, prevented any damage to critical aviation infrastructure or localized personnel. This failed strategic strike starkly illustrates the total degradation of Iran's conventional deterrence. The regime's inability to penetrate Israel's upper-tier defensive architecture, combined with its forced operational stand-down in the maritime domain, confirms that Tehran has lost the capacity to dictate the tempo of the conflict, reducing its wartime strategy to ineffective, isolated salvos.
events.description_ko: Arrow 3 Defeats Desperate Iranian Ballistic Missile Salvo Targeting Nevatim. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Coalition Drones Eliminate High-Ranking Iraqi Militia Commanders in Syria
events.title_ko: 미군 드론, 다마스쿠스서 이라크 민병대 지휘관 제거
events.description_en: Operating under the expanded mandate of Operation Epic Fury, United States MQ-9 Reaper unmanned combat aerial vehicles (UCAVs) executed a precision decapitation strike against a two-vehicle convoy transiting the southern suburbs of Damascus, Syria. Time-sensitive signals intelligence (SIGINT) confirmed the convoy was transporting high-ranking commanders belonging to Kata'ib Hezbollah, an elite Iranian-aligned Iraqi Shia militia. These operatives were actively attempting to reorganize the fractured logistical pipelines following the IAF's destruction of the Beqaa Valley transit corridors. The deployment of low-yield AGM-114R9X Hellfire missiles minimized collateral damage while ensuring the absolute kinetic elimination of the targeted individuals. This strike demonstrates the seamless intelligence-sharing and operational integration between US and Israeli forces, actively hunting proxy leadership nodes attempting to operate outside their primary sanctuary zones. By continuously decapitating the middle management of the Axis of Resistance, the coalition maintains severe operational paralysis across the network, preventing the Iraqi factions from effectively reinforcing the collapsing Lebanese front.
events.description_ko: Coalition Drones Eliminate High-Ranking Iraqi Militia Commanders in Syria. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Pentagon Re-allocates Carrier Strike Group Following Maritime De-escalation
