events.description_en: In immediate response to the verified, theater-wide stand-down of Houthi maritime interdiction operations, the United States Department of Defense officially ordered the strategic re-allocation of naval assets within the CENTCOM area of responsibility. The USS Theodore Roosevelt Carrier Strike Group (CSG), previously tasked with localized sea denial and continuous defensive operations in the Red Sea, was ordered to transit the Bab el-Mandeb strait and assume an aggressive, forward-deployed offensive posture in the Gulf of Oman. This massive redeployment of combat power significantly intensifies the localized threat matrix facing the Iranian homeland. Freed from the attritional burden of continuous anti-ship ballistic missile (ASBM) interceptions, the US Navy is now concentrating its strike fighter wings and Tomahawk land-attack cruise missile (TLAM) inventories directly off the Iranian coast. This maneuver signals a definitive shift from defensive containment to absolute offensive readiness, optimizing the coalition's capacity to execute sustained, high-volume strategic bombardment against remaining IRGC infrastructure.
events.description_ko: Pentagon Re-allocates Carrier Strike Group Following Maritime De-escalation. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Isolated Hezbollah Cells Launch Desperate Mortar Barrages on Northern Border
events.title_ko: 고립된 헤즈볼라, 북부 국경 박격포 공격
events.description_en: As the primary IDF ground offensive advanced deep into Lebanese territory near Sidon, isolated, bypassed pockets of Hezbollah operatives remaining in the immediate border region initiated desperate, uncoordinated mortar and short-range rocket barrages against the evacuated Israeli town of Metula. Lacking centralized command and control (C2) and cut off from resupply due to the IDF's successful envelopment maneuvers, these residual insurgent cells relied on pre-stashed ammunition caches to execute harassment fire. While the Iron Dome system engaged the larger projectiles, the short flight times of the localized mortar rounds resulted in multiple impacts within the abandoned civilian infrastructure, causing significant property destruction. This localized kinetic activity highlights the grueling reality of asymmetric urban clearing operations. Even as the proxy's operational-level architecture collapses, eradicating decentralized, fanatical infantry cells requires painstaking, house-to-house combat, ensuring that the immediate border zone will remain a highly lethal, non-permissive environment long after the primary conventional battles have concluded.
events.description_ko: Isolated Hezbollah Cells Launch Desperate Mortar Barrages on Northern Border. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: ICAO Formally Downgrades Middle East Airspace to Active Combat Zone
events.title_ko: ICAO, 중동 영공 교전구역 공식 지정
events.description_en: In a historic and devastating bureaucratic maneuver, the International Civil Aviation Organization (ICAO) formally issued a sweeping downgrade of the entire Middle Eastern aerospace architecture, officially classifying the airspace spanning from the Eastern Mediterranean to the Gulf of Oman as an 'Active and Unrestricted Combat Zone.' This unprecedented declaration effectively invalidates all standard commercial insurance policies for passenger and cargo carriers attempting to transit the region. The downgrade is a direct result of the continuous, uncoordinated ballistic missile trajectories, the mass proliferation of loitering munitions, and the severe, unpredictable degradation of regional air traffic control (ATC) infrastructure caused by Operation Epic Fury. By formalizing the closure of the region's skies, the ICAO solidifies the total logistical and economic isolation of the Middle East from the global aviation network. This mandate forces all trans-continental flights to utilize massively inefficient, highly congested detour routes over Africa and Central Asia, permanently baking severe inflationary pressures and logistical bottlenecks into the global supply chain for the foreseeable future.
events.description_ko: ICAO Formally Downgrades Middle East Airspace to Active Combat Zone. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Coalition Bunker-Busters Target Residual Natanz Subterranean Facilities
events.description_en: At 02:00 UTC, a synchronized coalition strike package consisting of United States Air Force B-2 Spirit stealth bombers and Israeli Air Force F-35I Adirs executed a highly complex deep-penetration raid against the Natanz nuclear enrichment complex. Utilizing advanced GBU-57 Massive Ordnance Penetrators (MOPs), the coalition targeted newly identified subterranean auxiliary tunnels assessed by intelligence as housing relocated advanced centrifuge cascades. This sustained counter-proliferation bombardment represents the coalition's absolute refusal to allow any residual Iranian nuclear latency to survive the conflict. The kinetic impacts triggered localized seismic events detected by regional geological monitoring stations, confirming massive structural collapse within the heavily fortified mountain facility. By continuously degrading the physical infrastructure of Iran's nuclear program, Washington and Jerusalem permanently eliminate the regime's ultimate strategic deterrent. The strikes force the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) to expend its rapidly depleting air defense interceptors in a futile attempt to protect static, high-value targets against fifth-generation stealth platforms, accelerating the total exhaustion of Iran's conventional defensive architecture.
events.description_ko: Coalition Bunker-Busters Target Residual Natanz Subterranean Facilities. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF 36th Division Crosses Awali River Approaching Beirut
events.description_en: Exploiting the momentum gained from the collapse of Hezbollah's Sidon defensive lines, the Israel Defense Forces (IDF) 36th Armored Division executed a rapid, mechanized river-crossing operation at the Awali River. Supported by overwhelming rotary-wing close air support (CAS) and sustained artillery barrages, Israeli Merkava Mark IV columns and Namer heavy armored personnel carriers established a firm bridgehead on the northern bank. This aggressive maneuver effectively traps remaining Hezbollah units in the southern pockets and opens a direct, relatively uncontested highway vector toward the southern suburbs of Beirut. The proxy force, severely degraded by weeks of intense IAF interdiction and facing severe logistical strangulation, offered only disorganized, localized resistance consisting of uncoordinated mortar fire and small-arms ambushes. The crossing of the Awali River represents a catastrophic operational failure for Hezbollah's defense-in-depth doctrine. It signals the imminent transition of the northern campaign from rural and localized urban clearing into a potential high-intensity siege of the Lebanese capital, drastically escalating the regional humanitarian crisis and forcing the proxy leadership into an existential tactical dilemma.
events.description_ko: IDF 36th Division Crosses Awali River Approaching Beirut. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: GCC Initiates Emergency Back-Channel Ceasefire Negotiations via Oman
events.title_ko: GCC, 오만 경유 비밀 휴전 협상 개시
events.description_en: Driven by mounting panic over the complete structural collapse of the Levantine security architecture and the severe macroeconomic volatility stemming from the ongoing conflict, the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) initiated an emergency, high-level diplomatic intervention. Spearheaded by the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and utilizing the Sultanate of Oman as the primary intermediary, the GCC established a classified back-channel communication framework linking Washington, Tehran, and the transitional government in Ramallah. This desperate diplomatic maneuvering aims to construct a viable off-ramp to halt the continuous kinetic degradation of regional infrastructure. Riyadh's intervention explicitly recognizes that the total annihilation of the Iranian state apparatus and the resulting power vacuum would inherently destabilize the entire Arabian Peninsula, potentially triggering massive refugee flows and empowering decentralized Sunni extremist networks. By attempting to broker a cessation of hostilities, the GCC seeks to preserve a heavily degraded but functionally intact Iranian state, prioritizing regional stability and the resumption of vital hydrocarbon exports over the coalition's maximalist objective of absolute regime change and total proxy eradication.
events.description_ko: GCC Initiates Emergency Back-Channel Ceasefire Negotiations via Oman. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Iron Dome Intercepts Iraqi Militia Drone Swarm Over Golan
events.title_ko: 아이언돔, 골란 상공 이라크 드론 요격
events.description_en: Despite the theater-wide operational pause dictated to the Yemeni Houthis, the Iraqi components of the Axis of Resistance maintained their horizontal escalation strategy, launching a coordinated swarm of Shahed-131 loitering munitions toward the Israeli-controlled Golan Heights. The drones, originating from the Syrian desert, utilized terrain-masking flight profiles through the Yarmouk River valley to evade long-range early warning radars. The Israeli Air Defense Array's localized Iron Dome batteries rapidly tracked and engaged the inbound threat matrix, achieving a 100% interception rate. The kinetic kills showered high-explosive debris over unpopulated agricultural zones, preventing any damage to IDF forward operating bases or civilian infrastructure. This engagement underscores the highly decentralized, fractured nature of the remaining proxy network. While Tehran can successfully command its primary economic disruptors in Yemen to stand down under extreme Chinese pressure, the ideologically driven, highly autonomous Iraqi militias continue to execute localized harassment campaigns. This persistent, low-intensity kinetic friction forces the IDF to maintain a resource-intensive, 360-degree air defense posture even as its primary offensive combat power is concentrated in Lebanon.
events.description_ko: Iron Dome Intercepts Iraqi Militia Drone Swarm Over Golan. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IAF Strikes IRGC-QF Convoy Attempting Exfiltration to Iraq
events.title_ko: IAF, 이라크 탈출 시도 IRGC 차량 타격
events.description_en: Utilizing persistent, high-altitude drone surveillance and real-time signals intelligence (SIGINT), the Israeli Air Force (IAF) executed a precision interdiction strike against a three-vehicle convoy transiting the Damascus-Baghdad highway in eastern Syria. The convoy was positively identified as transporting senior Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Quds Force (IRGC-QF) liaison officers attempting a rapid exfiltration from the collapsing Levantine theater back to the relative safety of Iraqi territory. IAF F-15I strike fighters deployed low-yield precision-guided munitions (PGMs) to completely obliterate the vehicles, resulting in the kinetic elimination of the targeted personnel. This strike is a critical component of Israel's theater-wide strategy to permanently decapitate the proxy network's command architecture and trap high-value Iranian operatives within the active combat zone. By systematically severing the exfiltration routes, the coalition induces severe psychological friction within the remaining proxy leadership, demonstrating that the IRGC cannot guarantee the safety of its forward-deployed commanders. This relentless targeting further isolates Hezbollah, ensuring the complete severance of its tactical coordination with Tehran.
events.description_ko: IAF Strikes IRGC-QF Convoy Attempting Exfiltration to Iraq. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: USCYBERCOM Destabilizes Iranian National Power Grid
events.title_ko: 미 사이버사령부, 이란 전국 전력망 마비
events.description_en: In a massive, highly classified escalation of multi-domain warfare, United States Cyber Command (USCYBERCOM) initiated a theater-wide offensive cyber operation that successfully breached the Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition (SCADA) systems governing the Iranian national power grid. The deployment of advanced, logic-bomb malware induced cascading failures across primary electrical substations in Tehran, Isfahan, and Bandar Abbas, plunging critical military-industrial sectors into rolling, uncontrolled blackouts. This non-kinetic digital decapitation aims to paralyze the Islamic Republic's residual command-and-control (C2) infrastructure, blinding its localized air defense radars and severely disrupting the logistical supply chains required to maintain its ballistic missile forces. By weaponizing the digital domain, the coalition inflicts strategic-level operational friction without risking highly valuable fifth-generation stealth aircraft or exposing pilots to surface-to-air missile (SAM) threats. The successful grid destabilization represents a profound vulnerability in Iran's critical infrastructure, forcing the regime to divert massive engineering and cybersecurity resources to stabilize the civilian sector while actively absorbing high-intensity conventional bombardment, further accelerating the structural collapse of the state.
events.description_ko: USCYBERCOM Destabilizes Iranian National Power Grid. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: PIJ Launches Rocket Barrage from Gaza Humanitarian Zones
events.title_ko: PIJ, 가자 인도구역서 에일라트 로켓 발사
events.description_en: Demonstrating the enduring, cellular resilience of the Palestinian proxy factions, operatives affiliated with Palestinian Islamic Jihad (PIJ) executed a surprise, localized rocket barrage targeting the southern Israeli port city of Eilat. IDF counter-battery radar telemetry definitively confirmed that the unguided 122mm Grad rockets were launched from deeply concealed, subterranean launch tubes situated directly within the internationally designated Al-Mawasi humanitarian safe zone in the southern Gaza Strip. The Israeli Iron Dome system successfully intercepted the projectiles over the Red Sea, preventing civilian casualties or infrastructural damage. However, this asymmetric attack achieves a critical psychological and diplomatic objective for the Axis of Resistance. By continually launching strikes from densely populated civilian encampments, PIJ deliberately weaponizes the laws of armed conflict, forcing the IDF into a paralyzing operational dilemma: absorb the continuous kinetic harassment or execute retaliatory counter-battery fire into vulnerable civilian populations, thereby exacerbating the severe international diplomatic friction surrounding the ongoing Gaza campaign and distracting coalition resources from the primary Iranian front.
events.description_ko: PIJ Launches Rocket Barrage from Gaza Humanitarian Zones. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IAF Targets Hezbollah Administrative Centers in Central Beirut
events.description_en: Expanding its target matrix beyond the traditional Dahiyeh stronghold, the Israeli Air Force (IAF) executed a wave of precision airstrikes targeting Hezbollah administrative and financial centers located in the densely populated, central districts of Beirut. The strikes, utilizing highly accurate, low-collateral-damage munitions, struck multi-story commercial buildings identified by Israeli military intelligence as front companies utilized by the proxy group to launder illicit funds and manage its sprawling social services network. This vertical escalation signals the IDF's intent to completely dismantle Hezbollah's political and economic apparatus, recognizing that neutralizing its kinetic capabilities is insufficient to ensure long-term regional security. Striking the heart of the Lebanese capital purposefully shatters the tacit rules of engagement, inducing mass panic among the civilian population and generating immense domestic political pressure against Hezbollah from rival Lebanese factions. This aggressive shaping operation aims to precipitate the total institutional collapse of the proxy, paving the way for the advancing IDF ground forces to secure a fundamentally altered, sanitized security environment across the entirety of the Levantine theater.
events.description_ko: IAF Targets Hezbollah Administrative Centers in Central Beirut. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF Armor Reaches Southern Outskirts of Beirut
events.description_en: The IDF 36th Armored Division, advancing rapidly following the Awali River crossing, established forward operational perimeters in the Choueifat and Khalde municipalities on the immediate southern outskirts of Beirut. This rapid mechanized thrust effectively severs the capital from the southern Lebanese theater, physically isolating the Hezbollah high command and trapping thousands of proxy combatants within the dense urban center. Hezbollah resistance during the final approach was sporadic and disorganized, reflecting severe command-and-control degradation resulting from prior IAF decapitation strikes. The IDF's establishment of a physical siege line marks a critical inflection point, transitioning the northern campaign from a mobile war of maneuver to a static, high-attrition urban containment operation aimed at forcing a total proxy capitulation.
events.description_ko: IDF Armor Reaches Southern Outskirts of Beirut. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: USAF Targets Subterranean Fiber-Optic C2 Nodes
events.title_ko: 미 공군, 이란 지하 통신망 타격
events.description_en: To compound the effects of the USCYBERCOM grid destabilization, US Air Force F-22 Raptors executed precision strikes against heavily fortified, subterranean fiber-optic communication junctions situated in the Alborz mountains north of Tehran. Intelligence assessments indicated the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) was attempting to route emergency command-and-control telemetry through these hardened, analog redundancy networks. Kinetically neutralizing these junctions ensures the continued paralysis of Iran's strategic aerospace and ballistic missile forces, preventing any coordinated, theater-level retaliatory salvos. This fusion of cyber and kinetic warfare demonstrates the coalition's capacity to induce absolute systemic blindness across the Iranian military apparatus, effectively denying the regime the ability to synthesize situational awareness or issue centralized directives.
events.description_ko: USAF Targets Subterranean Fiber-Optic C2 Nodes. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: US Patriot Batteries Neutralize Iraqi Militia Drone Swarm
events.description_en: US Army Patriot PAC-3 batteries intercepted a coordinated swarm of six Shahed-131 loitering munitions attempting to penetrate Kuwaiti airspace and strike the Ali Al Salem Air Base. The drones, launched by Iranian-aligned Iraqi militias, represent the continued horizontal escalation strategy of the decentralized Axis of Resistance. The successful kinetic kills prevented any structural damage to the critical CENTCOM logistics hub. However, the persistent proxy targeting of GCC sovereign territory highlights the ongoing requirement for the United States to expend high-value interceptor stockpiles to shield regional partners from asymmetric harassment, despite the broader strategic degradation of the primary Iranian sponsor.
events.description_ko: US Patriot Batteries Neutralize Iraqi Militia Drone Swarm. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IAF Decapitation Strikes Target Central Beirut Bunkers
events.description_en: The Israeli Air Force (IAF) executed a wave of concentrated bunker-buster strikes targeting specific residential and commercial complexes within central Beirut, areas heavily infiltrated by Hezbollah's elite political and military leadership. Utilizing advanced GBU-39 Small Diameter Bombs to minimize collateral damage in the dense metropolitan zone, the strikes aimed to eliminate the proxy's surviving command echelon before the impending ground siege fully commenced. This vertical escalation within the Lebanese capital deliberately shatters tacit red lines, utilizing overwhelming kinetic pressure to precipitate internal organizational collapse and force a formalized surrender from the shattered militant group by systematically eliminating its ability to govern or command residual forces.
events.description_ko: IAF Decapitation Strikes Target Central Beirut Bunkers. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: GCC Mediators Present De-escalation Framework to Tehran
events.description_en: During highly classified, indirect negotiations in Muscat, Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) intermediaries, led by Omani diplomats, presented a comprehensive, multi-phase de-escalation framework to representatives of the Iranian government. The proposed terms require the permanent, verifiable disarmament of Hezbollah and a legally binding cessation of IRGC regional proliferation in exchange for the halting of coalition strategic bombardment and a phased lifting of secondary US economic sanctions. The initiation of these substantive talks indicates that the extreme infrastructural devastation and the Chinese diplomatic ultimatum have successfully forced the Iranian regime to the negotiating table, prioritizing baseline state survival over the ideological continuation of the proxy war.
events.description_ko: GCC Mediators Present De-escalation Framework to Tehran. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF Repels PIJ Ambush Attempt in Central Gaza
events.description_en: Elements of the IDF's 162nd Division, conducting sustained clearing operations in the Zaytoun neighborhood of Gaza City, successfully repelled a complex ambush initiated by residual Palestinian Islamic Jihad (PIJ) operatives. The militants utilized a combination of subterranean emergence tactics and rocket-propelled grenades (RPGs) to engage a mechanized infantry patrol. The IDF utilized integrated rotary-wing close air support (CAS) and localized armored counter-fire to kinetically neutralize the insurgent cell. This localized friction underscores that while the primary regional conflict centers on Lebanon and Iran, the Gaza theater remains a persistent, low-intensity insurgency requiring continuous Israeli military resource allocation and counter-insurgency vigilance.
events.description_ko: IDF Repels PIJ Ambush Attempt in Central Gaza. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: US Navy Commences Aggressive Minesweeping Operations
events.description_en: Capitalizing on the verified, Chinese-mandated operational stand-down of Houthi anti-ship ballistic missile attacks, the United States Navy's Fifth Fleet initiated aggressive, theater-wide airborne and surface mine countermeasures operations across the Bab el-Mandeb strait. Utilizing MH-53E Sea Dragon helicopters and Avenger-class mine countermeasures ships, the coalition is systematically clearing the vital maritime corridor of suspected IRGC-supplied contact and influence mines. This proactive logistical operation aims to rapidly restore absolute freedom of navigation and stabilize global energy markets, permanently reversing the economic disruption inflicted by the Yemeni proxy network's localized A2/AD campaign during the conflict's earlier phases.
events.description_ko: US Navy Commences Aggressive Minesweeping Operations. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Iron Dome Intercepts Syrian-Launched Heavy Rockets
events.description_en: The Israeli Air Defense Array achieved multiple interceptions utilizing the Iron Dome system against a salvo of unguided 122mm heavy rockets launched from the Syrian side of the Golan Heights. Counter-battery radar confirmed the munitions were fired by Iranian-backed Syrian auxiliary militias attempting to draw IDF attention away from the Lebanese front. The successful interceptions prevented any impacts on Israeli forward operating bases or civilian infrastructure in the northern sector. This continuous, low-level kinetic harassment confirms the enduring, decentralized resilience of the Axis of Resistance's peripheral elements despite the systemic collapse of their primary sponsors.
events.description_ko: Iron Dome Intercepts Syrian-Launched Heavy Rockets. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF Completes Encirclement of Beirut Metropolitan Area
events.description_en: The Israel Defense Forces (IDF) Northern Command achieved a decisive strategic milestone by completing the physical encirclement of the Beirut metropolitan area. Elements of the 36th and 98th Divisions, utilizing mechanized infantry and heavy armor, secured the final overland transit corridors leading into the capital, effectively establishing a hermetic cordon. This maneuver isolates Hezbollah's surviving central command and thousands of proxy operatives within a dense, highly contested urban environment. The establishment of this siege line transitions the Levantine campaign from dynamic, high-speed maneuver warfare into a methodical, protracted urban containment operation. The IDF's objective is to systematically suffocate the proxy's logistical lifelines, forcing the militant group into an untenable attritional dilemma. By denying any possibility of exfiltration or external resupply, the coalition maximizes psychological and physical pressure, deliberately engineering an environment designed to precipitate the total organizational collapse of Hezbollah without necessitating an immediate, high-casualty block-by-block invasion of the entire capital.
events.description_ko: IDF 36·98사단이 베이루트 광역시를 완전히 포위하는 데 성공, 헤즈볼라의 모든 탈출로와 외부 보급선을 차단했다.

events.title_en: IAF Targets Subterranean IRGC Command Bunkers
events.title_ko: IAF, 케르만샤 IRGC 지하 지휘소 타격
events.description_en: Exploiting the persistent degradation of Iran's national power grid and early warning radar architectureâa direct result of sustained USCYBERCOM digital offensivesâthe Israeli Air Force (IAF) executed a wave of deep-penetration strikes against the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC). F-35I Adir stealth fighters, operating with near-impunity in the degraded airspace, targeted heavily fortified subterranean command-and-control bunkers located in the mountainous Kermanshah province. The strikes utilized specialized earth-penetrating munitions to collapse the facilities, which were assessed to be housing residual elements of the IRGC Aerospace Force attempting to re-establish secure communication links with decentralized proxy networks. This continuous kinetic pressure underscores the coalition's commitment to maintaining absolute operational paralysis across the Iranian military apparatus. By systematically hunting down and destroying secondary and tertiary C2 nodes, the IAF ensures that Tehran remains incapable of organizing a coherent, theater-level retaliatory response.
events.description_ko: IAF Targets Subterranean IRGC Command Bunkers. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: US Navy Accelerates Mine Countermeasures in Red Sea
events.title_ko: 미 해군, 홍해 소해 작전 가속
events.description_en: Capitalizing on the verified, Chinese-mandated operational stand-down of Houthi maritime interdiction forces, the United States Navy Fifth Fleet drastically accelerated its Mine Countermeasures and Freedom of Navigation Operations across the Bab el-Mandeb strait and the southern Red Sea. Utilizing MH-53E Sea Dragon helicopters towing advanced magnetic and acoustic sweeping sleds, alongside specialized Avenger-class MCM vessels, the coalition systematically cleared critical shipping lanes of suspected Iranian-supplied contact and influence mines. This aggressive logistical operation is an absolute strategic priority, aimed at rapidly restoring the integrity of global maritime supply chains and mitigating the severe macroeconomic shocks generated by the protracted closure of the corridor. The unimpeded execution of these sweeping operations highlights the profound tactical shift in the maritime domain, demonstrating that the sheer economic gravity of peer-competitor intervention has successfully neutralized the Axis of Resistance's most disruptive asymmetric capability.
events.description_ko: US Navy Accelerates Mine Countermeasures in Red Sea. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: US Forces Repel Iraqi Militia Drone Swarm at Conoco Base
events.title_ko: 미군, 코노코 기지 드론 공격 격퇴
events.description_en: US military personnel stationed at the Conoco Mission Support Site in eastern Syria successfully repelled a complex, multi-vector drone swarm initiated by Iranian-aligned Iraqi Shia militias. The localized defense architecture, heavily reliant on Coyote interceptor drones and Phalanx Close-In Weapon Systems, tracked and kinetically neutralized a salvo of five Ababil-T loitering munitions utilizing terrain-masking flight profiles along the Euphrates River valley. This engagement vividly illustrates the deeply fractured, decentralized nature of the remaining Axis of Resistance. While Tehran has successfully imposed a strategic stand-down on its Yemeni proxy to appease Beijing, the highly autonomous, ideologically driven Iraqi militias continue to execute a horizontal escalation strategy. This persistent, low-intensity kinetic friction is designed to continuously harass forward-deployed American forces, forcing the United States to maintain a resource-intensive, high-alert defensive posture and continuously expend valuable interceptor magazines.
events.description_ko: US Forces Repel Iraqi Militia Drone Swarm at Conoco Base. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Iran Evaluates GCC Ceasefire Ultimatum in Muscat
events.description_en: In the highly classified, Omani-brokered back-channel negotiations in Muscat, Iranian diplomatic representatives formally received and began evaluating a stark, binary de-escalation ultimatum presented by the Gulf Cooperation Council. The framework demands the immediate, verifiable disarmament of Hezbollah and a legally binding cessation of IRGC regional proliferation activities. In exchange, the coalition offers a halt to strategic bombardment and a phased, internationally monitored lifting of crippling secondary economic sanctions. This diplomatic juncture represents the culmination of the coalition's maximum-pressure attritional campaign. The extreme physical devastation of the Iranian military-industrial complex, combined with the catastrophic collapse of its national power grid and the impending loss of its primary Levantine proxy, has forced the regime into an existential corner.
events.description_ko: Iran Evaluates GCC Ceasefire Ultimatum in Muscat. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IAF Executes Precision Strikes on Hezbollah C2 Nodes in Dahiyeh
events.title_ko: IAF, 다히예 헤즈볼라 지휘소 정밀 타격
events.description_en: The Israeli Air Force executed a highly concentrated wave of precision airstrikes targeting the Dahiyeh suburb, the traditional Hezbollah stronghold located within the newly encircled Beirut metropolitan area. Utilizing low-yield, precision-guided munitions designed to minimize collateral damage in the dense urban topography, Israeli fighter squadrons systematically leveled specific multi-story structures identified by military intelligence as active, subterranean command-and-control nodes and munitions caches. These strikes function as aggressive shaping operations, deliberately designed to soften Hezbollah's defensive architecture prior to potential localized ground incursions. By continuously decapitating the proxy's tactical leadership and destroying specialized equipment within the besieged capital, the IDF induces severe organizational friction and psychological degradation among the trapped militant forces.
events.description_ko: IAF Executes Precision Strikes on Hezbollah C2 Nodes in Dahiyeh. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Iron Dome Intercepts Syrian Militia Rocket Fire at Golan
events.title_ko: 아이언돔, 골란 시리아 민병대 로켓 요격
events.description_en: The Israeli Air Defense Array achieved multiple interceptions utilizing the Iron Dome system against a localized, low-volume barrage of unguided 107mm rockets launched from the Syrian side of the Golan Heights. Counter-battery radar telemetry definitively confirmed the munitions were fired by Iranian-backed Syrian auxiliary militias. The projectiles were kinetically neutralized in the exo-atmosphere, preventing any impacts on IDF forward operating bases or northern Israeli agricultural communities. This isolated kinetic harassment is a desperate, uncoordinated attempt by the peripheral elements of the proxy network to project continued relevance and divert Israeli ISR and defensive resources away from the primary siege operations in Beirut.
events.description_ko: Iron Dome Intercepts Syrian Militia Rocket Fire at Golan. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: PLAN Task Force Conducts High-Visibility FONOPs in Gulf of Aden
events.title_ko: 중국 해군, 아덴만 항행의 자유 작전
events.description_en: The People's Liberation Army Navy task force, spearheaded by a Type 052D destroyer, conducted high-visibility Freedom of Navigation Operations throughout the Gulf of Aden and the approaches to the Bab el-Mandeb strait. This overt naval posturing serves a dual strategic purpose. First, it physically enforces the Chinese-mandated operational stand-down of Houthi maritime interdiction forces, ensuring the uninterrupted transit of Beijing-owned commercial shipping. Second, it serves as a stark, geopolitical signal to the US-led coalition, demonstrating China's capacity and willingness to unilaterally project blue-water naval power to secure its critical energy and logistical lifelines in the Middle East. The presence of heavily armed, peer-competitor surface combatants operating independently within the active conflict zone permanently alters the regional security architecture.
events.description_ko: PLAN Task Force Conducts High-Visibility FONOPs in Gulf of Aden. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Coalition Degrades IRGC Internal Security Infrastructure
events.title_ko: 연합군, IRGC 내부 치안 인프라 타격
events.description_en: With the Iranian national power grid severely compromised by USCYBERCOM offensives, coalition air assets shifted targeting priorities to neutralize Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) internal security and riot-control headquarters in metropolitan Tehran. Utilizing low-yield precision munitions to minimize collateral damage, stealth platforms systematically dismantled the C2 nodes responsible for coordinating the suppression of rapidly expanding civilian protests. This strategic pivot actively exploits the regime's digital blindness, deliberately fostering domestic instability to compound the external kinetic pressure. By degrading the state's monopoly on internal violence during a period of catastrophic infrastructural collapse, the coalition aims to accelerate the political fracturing of the Islamic Republic, forcing the leadership to divert vital military resources away from proxy coordination and toward regime survival.
events.description_ko: Coalition Degrades IRGC Internal Security Infrastructure. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF Breaches Dahiyeh Outer Defensive Perimeter
events.description_en: Following weeks of intense shaping operations, the IDF 98th Division initiated a major ground assault into the Dahiyeh suburb of southern Beirut. Heavily armored Namer personnel carriers and Combat Engineering Corps D9 bulldozers breached the primary barricades, encountering fierce, defense-in-depth resistance from Hezbollah's entrenched Radwan Force. Combat devolved into brutal, block-by-block urban warfare characterized by the extensive proxy use of explosively formed penetrators (EFPs), sniper enfilades, and subterranean flanking maneuvers. The breach of Dahiyeh marks the most lethal phase of the Levantine campaign to date. Advancing through the densely packed, heavily booby-trapped urban terrain negates the IDF's traditional advantages in mechanized maneuverability, forcing a reliance on high-casualty infantry clearing operations to physically dismantle the proxy's paramount strategic stronghold and extract embedded leadership elements.
events.description_ko: IDF Breaches Dahiyeh Outer Defensive Perimeter. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: US Navy Aegis Cruisers Defeat Iraqi Cruise Missile Salvo
events.title_ko: 미 해군, 이라크 민병대 순항미사일 격파
events.description_en: A US Navy Ticonderoga-class guided-missile cruiser operating in the central Persian Gulf successfully intercepted a coordinated salvo of four land-attack cruise missiles. Radar telemetry confirmed the munitions were launched by Iranian-aligned Iraqi Shia militias, utilizing complex sea-skimming trajectories to evade land-based GCC early warning radars. The intended targets were assessed to be critical offshore oil platforms within the Saudi-Kuwaiti neutral zone. This desperate horizontal escalation attempt reflects the Iraqi proxy network's intent to shatter the localized de-escalation framework and force a broader regional economic crisis. The successful kinetic neutralization of the cruise missiles by SM-2 interceptors preserves the fragile stability of the global energy markets but necessitates continuous, high-alert naval air defense operations, severely taxing the endurance and interceptor magazines of the deployed coalition maritime task forces.
events.description_ko: US Navy Aegis Cruisers Defeat Iraqi Cruise Missile Salvo. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Widespread Anti-Regime Riots Paralyze Iranian Capital
events.title_ko: 테헤란·이스파한 등 이란 전역 반정부 폭동
events.description_en: Unprecedented, large-scale anti-regime riots erupted across major Iranian urban centers, most notably in Tehran, Isfahan, and Shiraz. Catalyzed by the catastrophic collapse of the national power grid, extreme economic deprivation, and the visible degradation of the IRGC's internal security apparatus, civilian populations initiated widespread demonstrations demanding the immediate cessation of the proxy war and the dissolution of the Islamic Republic. Protesters successfully overran several localized Basij militia armories, leading to localized armed clashes with internal security forces. This massive domestic destabilization presents an existential threat to the regime, fundamentally altering the strategic calculus of the conflict. The supreme leadership is now forced to fight a high-intensity two-front war: absorbing devastating coalition strategic bombardment from above while simultaneously combating a rapidly escalating, armed civilian insurrection from within, rapidly accelerating the state's structural collapse.
events.description_ko: 이란 전역에서 전국 단전·경제난·IRGC 내부치안 붕괴를 계기로 대규모 반정부 폭동이 발생, 일부 시민이 바시즈 민병대 무기고를 탈취해 무장충돌이 발생했다.

events.title_en: IDF Uncovers Strategic Subterranean Network Beneath Beirut Airport
events.title_ko: IDF, 베이루트 공항 지하 터널 발견
events.description_en: During intensive clearing operations on the southern periphery of the besieged Lebanese capital, IDF Combat Engineering units, utilizing advanced seismic sensors and ground-penetrating radar, uncovered a massive, multi-level subterranean tunnel network extending directly beneath the Rafic Hariri International Airport. The complex was heavily fortified with reinforced concrete and contained extensive weapons caches, command centers, and sophisticated ventilation systems designed to sustain prolonged subterranean combat. The discovery validates longstanding coalition intelligence assessments regarding Hezbollah's exploitation of critical dual-use civilian infrastructure. The IDF initiated controlled demolitions utilizing liquid explosives to permanently collapse the network, permanently denying the proxy force its primary subterranean logistical hub within the capital. This action further accelerates Hezbollah's organizational suffocation, physically isolating its combat cells and eliminating their capacity to maneuver beneath the tightening Israeli siege lines.
events.description_ko: IDF Uncovers Strategic Subterranean Network Beneath Beirut Airport. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IAF Obliterates Final IRGC Supply Convoy in Eastern Syria
events.title_ko: IAF, 시리아 동부 IRGC 마지막 보급대 격파
events.description_en: The Israeli Air Force executed a decisive interdiction strike against a massive logistical convoy attempting to cross the Iraqi-Syrian border at the Al-Bukamal crossing. The convoy, consisting of over thirty heavy transport vehicles, was definitively identified by persistent drone surveillance as carrying emergency resupplies of short-range ballistic missiles and anti-tank munitions allocated for the besieged Hezbollah forces in Lebanon. IAF F-15I Ra'am fighters utilized a combination of cluster munitions and precision-guided bombs to completely obliterate the transport column, triggering massive secondary detonations that cratered the primary transit highway. This kinetic engagement seals the trans-regional land bridge, confirming the absolute operational isolation of the Levantine theater. The destruction of this final, desperate resupply effort guarantees that Hezbollah must conclude its defense of Beirut utilizing only its rapidly depleting, pre-existing arsenals.
events.description_ko: IAF Obliterates Final IRGC Supply Convoy in Eastern Syria. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Iran Formally Requests Extension on GCC Ceasefire Ultimatum
events.title_ko: 이란, GCC 휴전 최후통첩 연장 요청
events.description_en: Operating through diplomatic back-channels in Muscat, representatives of the Iranian Foreign Ministry formally requested a 48-hour extension to the de-escalation ultimatum previously issued by the Gulf Cooperation Council. The Iranian delegation cited extreme internal communication breakdowns and the necessity to convene the severely degraded Supreme National Security Council to authorize the comprehensive disarmament of its Levantine proxy network. This desperate diplomatic maneuver strongly indicates a profound fracture within the Iranian power structure, likely pitting the pragmatic political establishment seeking regime survival against the ideologically rigid, heavily battered remnants of the IRGC. The request for a delay reflects the regime's paralysis in the face of absolute systemic collapse, buying temporary diplomatic space while failing to alter the devastating kinetic reality on the ground.
events.description_ko: Iran Formally Requests Extension on GCC Ceasefire Ultimatum. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Besieged Hezbollah Cells Launch Unguided Barrage at Central Israel
events.description_en: In a desperate, highly symbolic display of retained kinetic capability, isolated Hezbollah command cells trapped within the Beirut siege ring launched a barrage of twenty unguided heavy rockets targeting the Tel Aviv metropolitan area. Fired from concealed, mobile launch tubes positioned within densely populated civilian neighborhoods of the Lebanese capital, the projectiles lacked the sophisticated guidance systems utilized in earlier phases of the conflict. The Israeli Iron Dome and David's Sling systems engaged the threat, successfully intercepting the majority of the barrage. However, two projectiles penetrated the defensive umbrella, impacting a suburban residential zone and causing structural damage. This attack serves as a stark reminder of the immense difficulty of achieving absolute zero-leaker air defense, particularly when countering decentralized, fanatical proxy elements willing to expend their final munitions in a futile effort to inflict psychological terror on the Israeli home front.
events.description_ko: Besieged Hezbollah Cells Launch Unguided Barrage at Central Israel. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Reported Armed Friction Between IRGC and Artesh Units in Tehran
events.description_en: Multiple credible reports indicated escalating armed friction between hardline IRGC units and elements of the conventional Iranian military (Artesh) in western Tehran. Accounts described confrontations at security checkpoints and command facilities, reflecting the deepening institutional split between ideological IRGC hardliners and pragmatic Artesh commanders seeking to stabilize the Iranian state apparatus following the supreme leadership transition. These incidents have not been officially confirmed by Iranian government sources and should be treated as unverified reporting from opposition media.
events.description_ko: Reported Armed Friction Between IRGC and Artesh Units in Tehran. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF Strikes Hezbollah Command Infrastructure in Dahiyeh
events.title_ko: IDF, 다히예 헤즈볼라 지휘 인프라 타격
events.description_en: IDF aircraft executed a series of strikes targeting Hezbollah command infrastructure across the Dahiyeh suburb of southern Beirut. The strikes targeted command facilities and weapons storage sites. Hezbollah continued to fire rockets and missiles into northern Israel throughout the day. IDF confirmed operations were ongoing in the area. Per Alma Research data, Hezbollah conducted 49 attack waves against Israel on this date across multiple weapons categories.
events.description_ko: IDF Strikes Hezbollah Command Infrastructure in Dahiyeh. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: CENTCOM Confirms Strikes on Iranian Military Targets in Eastern Provinces
events.title_ko: 미 중부사령부, 이란 동부 군사 타격 확인
events.description_en: US Central Command confirmed coalition airstrikes on Iranian military targets in eastern provinces, including sites in South Khorasan Province approximately 800 kilometres inland from the Gulf of Oman. An Israeli OSINT account and CENTCOM statement by Admiral Brad Cooper confirmed that combined force aircraft were targeting Iran's military defense industrial base. The strike on a site near Bijrand was noted as one of the easternmost coalition strikes since the conflict began.
events.description_ko: CENTCOM Confirms Strikes on Iranian Military Targets in Eastern Provinces. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Hezbollah Fires Rockets Toward Haifa and Northern Communities
events.title_ko: 헤즈볼라, 하이파 및 북부 로켓 발사
events.description_en: Hezbollah launched rocket barrages toward Haifa and northern Israeli communities. IDF air defenses intercepted a portion of the incoming fire while other rockets hit open areas. The volume of fire on this date â 49 identified attack waves â represented an increase from the previous day. Most attacks were directed at border communities and the Galilee region, with IDF continuing to operate against Hezbollah positions in southern Lebanon simultaneously.
events.description_ko: Hezbollah Fires Rockets Toward Haifa and Northern Communities. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IAF Strikes IRGC Aerospace Facilities in Isfahan
events.title_ko: IAF, 이스파한 IRGC 항공우주 시설 타격
events.description_en: Israeli Air Force aircraft struck IRGC Aerospace Force facilities in the Isfahan region. Alma Research confirmed that Mehdi Karishi, the IRGC Aerospace Forces commander for the Isfahan sector, was eliminated in coalition strikes around this period. Isfahan remained a primary targeting area for the coalition given its concentration of Iranian missile and aerospace industrial infrastructure.
events.description_ko: IAF Strikes IRGC Aerospace Facilities in Isfahan. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: US Navy Conducts Mine Countermeasure Operations in Northern Red Sea
events.title_ko: 미 해군, 북부 홍해 소해 작전
events.description_en: US Navy Fifth Fleet assets continued intensive mine countermeasure operations across the northern Red Sea. The ongoing operations focused on maintaining freedom of navigation for commercial shipping through the region. No official declaration of the waterway being fully cleared was issued. CENTCOM maintained operational oversight of the maritime security corridor.
events.description_ko: US Navy Conducts Mine Countermeasure Operations in Northern Red Sea. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: GCC Ceasefire Framework Deadline Passes Without Unified Iranian Response
events.title_ko: GCC 휴전안 기한 도과, 이란 통일된 답변 없어
events.description_en: The deadline associated with the GCC-backed ceasefire diplomatic framework passed without a formal unified response from the fractured Iranian institutional structure. GCC member states had been communicating through back-channels with pragmatic elements of the Iranian military and government. However, the absence of a functioning unified Iranian decision-making authority â following the death of Supreme Leader Khamenei and the ongoing IRGC-Artesh tensions â prevented a consolidated institutional reply. Diplomatic activity was expected to continue through alternative channels.
events.description_ko: GCC Ceasefire Framework Deadline Passes Without Unified Iranian Response. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Iran Fires Missiles and Drones at Gulf States as Regional Attacks Continue
events.title_ko: 이란, 걸프 국가 미사일·드론 공격 지속
events.description_en: Iranian forces continued to launch missiles and drones against Gulf Cooperation Council states and US military facilities throughout the day and into the evening. UAE air defenses engaged multiple ballistic missiles and UAVs. Saudi Arabia confirmed interceptions over Riyadh and Eastern Province. Bahrain air defense systems remained on high alert. The scale of Iranian regional strikes on this date confirmed that Iran retained meaningful offensive capability despite the coalition degradation campaign.
events.description_ko: Iran Fires Missiles and Drones at Gulf States as Regional Attacks Continue. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Artesh High Command Issues Authority Assertions Over IRGC Provincial Units
events.title_ko: 아르테시 최고사령부, 지방 IRGC 지휘권 주장
events.description_en: The conventional Iranian military (Artesh) high command issued internal directives and public-facing statements asserting command authority over IRGC units in multiple provinces. The move reflected the Artesh's attempt to consolidate state control amid the ongoing institutional fracture. Compliance was reportedly uneven. Hardline IRGC units in western and southwestern provinces continued to operate independently under pre-existing ideological command structures. The Artesh-IRGC tension represented the most significant internal Iranian security dynamic of the conflict's third week.
events.description_ko: Artesh High Command Issues Authority Assertions Over IRGC Provincial Units. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF Continues Operations Against Hezbollah Infrastructure in Dahiyeh
events.title_ko: IDF, 다히예 헤즈볼라 인프라 작전 지속
events.description_en: IDF forces continued systematic operations against Hezbollah command and logistics infrastructure in the Dahiyeh suburb of Beirut. IDF struck a bridge over the Litani River in the village of Qa'qaiyat al-Jisr, continuing a pattern of targeting Lebanese river crossings to restrict Hezbollah logistics. Alma Research confirmed that 18 of the day's attack waves were Hezbollah strikes claimed against IDF forces operating in southern Lebanon, indicating continued ground contact.
events.description_ko: IDF Continues Operations Against Hezbollah Infrastructure in Dahiyeh. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Coalition Strikes Iranian Command and Aerospace Infrastructure
events.description_en: Coalition aircraft continued strikes on Iranian command and control nodes and aerospace industrial facilities across multiple provinces. Alma Research confirmed that IRGC Aerospace Forces commander for the Isfahan sector was eliminated in strikes during this period. Iranian internet restrictions were further tightened, according to internet monitor NetBlocks, limiting information flow out of the country.
events.description_ko: Coalition Strikes Iranian Command and Aerospace Infrastructure. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Hezbollah Sustains 54 Attack Waves Against Northern Israel
events.description_en: Hezbollah conducted 54 identified attack waves against Israeli territory on this date, according to Alma Research â an increase from the 49 recorded the previous day. Weapons used included rockets, missiles, UAVs, and anti-tank missiles. A residential building in Kiryat Shmona was struck, injuring four civilians. Attacks were concentrated on border communities and the Galilee. IDF continued to intercept a portion of incoming fire while responding with strikes against Hezbollah positions in southern Lebanon.
events.description_ko: Hezbollah Sustains 54 Attack Waves Against Northern Israel. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: UAE Air Defenses Engage Iranian Ballistic Missiles and UAVs
events.description_en: UAE Ministry of Defense reported that air defense systems engaged seven ballistic missiles and fifteen UAVs throughout the day, while also noting that since the start of the conflict UAE defenses had cumulatively engaged 334 ballistic missiles, 15 cruise missiles, and 1,714 UAVs. UAE State Security announced the uncovering of a Hezbollah-funded and directed terrorist network within the country. Dubai International Airport and a French military base in the UAE were also struck during this period.
events.description_ko: UAE Air Defenses Engage Iranian Ballistic Missiles and UAVs. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Lebanese PM Salam Calls for State Authority Over War and Peace Decisions
events.title_ko: 레바논 살람 총리, 전쟁 결정권 국가 환수 촉구
events.description_en: Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam delivered a public address emphasizing that Lebanon did not formally adopt a "support" position toward Iran or Gaza, but was forced to bear the consequences of Hezbollah's actions. He called for restoring decision-making authority on war and peace exclusively to the Lebanese state, under the principle of one law, one army, and one authority. The statement reflected the Lebanese government's effort to distance itself from Hezbollah's strategic decisions while managing the conflict on its territory.
events.description_ko: Lebanese PM Salam Calls for State Authority Over War and Peace Decisions. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Hezbollah Fires Unusual Missile Launch Toward Ashkelon Area
events.description_en: Alma Research recorded an unusual single missile launch from Lebanon directed toward the Ashkelon area in southern Israel â a geographic extension of Hezbollah fire beyond the typical northern target belt. The launch was consistent with Hezbollah's broader strategy of demonstrating expanded geographic reach and forcing Israeli air defense assets to cover a wider defensive perimeter. IDF air defenses responded to the incoming fire.
events.description_ko: Hezbollah Fires Unusual Missile Launch Toward Ashkelon Area. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: GCC and International Partners Continue Diplomatic Back-Channel Activity
events.title_ko: GCC, 비공개 외교 채널 활동 지속
events.description_en: Gulf Cooperation Council member states continued diplomatic back-channel communications with pragmatic elements of the Iranian military establishment. France announced it was doubling humanitarian aid to Lebanon to 17 million euros. Regional diplomatic activity focused on whether a ceasefire framework could be constructed that the fractured Iranian institutional structure could actually agree to and implement. No formal agreement was reached.
events.description_ko: GCC and International Partners Continue Diplomatic Back-Channel Activity. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Trump Issues 48-Hour Ultimatum on Strait of Hormuz
events.description_en: US President Donald Trump posted a direct ultimatum on Truth Social: "If Iran doesn't FULLY OPEN, WITHOUT THREAT, the Strait of Hormuz, within 48 HOURS from this exact point in time, the United States of America will hit and obliterate their various POWER PLANTS, STARTING WITH THE BIGGEST ONE FIRST." Iran's Parliament Speaker Mohammad Baqer Ghalibaf responded by warning that critical infrastructure and energy facilities across the Middle East could be "irreversibly destroyed" should Iranian power plants be targeted. The ultimatum represented a significant escalation of US war aims beyond military infrastructure.
events.description_ko: 트럼프 대통령이 트루스소셜에 이란이 48시간 내 호르무즈 해협을 완전 개방하지 않으면 대형 발전소부터 공격하겠다고 최후통첩을 발표했다.

events.title_en: Coalition Strikes Iranian Missile Production Infrastructure
events.title_ko: 연합군, 이란 미사일 생산 시설 타격
events.description_en: Coalition aircraft struck Iranian missile production and storage facilities across multiple provinces. CENTCOM confirmed that IDF strikes had destroyed approximately 70 percent of Iran's missile launchers since the conflict began on February 28. A senior IDF official noted that Iranian missile crews were experiencing desertions and refusals to follow orders, contributing to the reduced launch tempo observed since day 10 of the conflict. The strikes focused on hardened underground storage and production sites.
events.description_ko: Coalition Strikes Iranian Missile Production Infrastructure. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF Combat Engineers Conduct Demolition Operations in Dahiyeh
events.description_en: IDF Combat Engineering units continued systematic demolition operations against Hezbollah subterranean infrastructure in Dahiyeh. The operations targeted tunnel networks, command bunkers, and weapons storage facilities beneath the suburb. IDF was simultaneously striking Hezbollah positions in southern Lebanon and the Beqaa Valley. Shrapnel from an Iranian missile intercepted over Jerusalem fell in the Old City, causing material damage.
events.description_ko: IDF Combat Engineers Conduct Demolition Operations in Dahiyeh. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Iran Launches Fifth Missile Barrage of the Day Against Northern Israel
events.description_en: Iranian forces launched the fifth identified missile barrage against northern Israel since dawn, with sirens sounding in Kiryat Shmona and Misgav Am. IDF air defenses engaged the incoming fire. The continued high operational tempo of Iranian missile launches â despite the 70 percent launcher degradation reported by CENTCOM â indicated Iran was preserving remaining mobile launch capability for high-priority strikes and rotating surviving launchers to new positions.
events.description_ko: Iran Launches Fifth Missile Barrage of the Day Against Northern Israel. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Iran Continues Strikes on Gulf State Infrastructure
events.title_ko: 이란, 걸프 국가 인프라 공격 지속
events.description_en: Iranian forces conducted ongoing missile and drone strikes against Gulf Cooperation Council states. Saudi Arabia reported interceptions over Riyadh and Eastern Province. The UAE Ministry of Defense confirmed continued engagement of incoming threats. Jordan's military reported that 240 missiles and drones had been fired at Jordanian territory since the war began, wounding 24 people. Egypt's President el-Sissi and Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman issued a joint statement condemning Iranian escalation against Gulf states.
events.description_ko: Iran Continues Strikes on Gulf State Infrastructure. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Iran Threatens Gulf Energy Infrastructure in Response to Hormuz Ultimatum
events.title_ko: 이란, 걸프 에너지 인프라 보복 위협
events.description_en: Iranian military leadership formally responded to Trump's Hormuz ultimatum by threatening to strike all energy infrastructure linked to the US and Israel across the Middle East if Iranian power plants were targeted. The Iranian parliament began drafting legislation to formally codify Iranian sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz and establish a toll collection mechanism for transiting vessels. The legislative effort reflected an attempt to institutionalise de facto Iranian control over the waterway.
events.description_ko: Iran Threatens Gulf Energy Infrastructure in Response to Hormuz Ultimatum. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF Issues Evacuation Notice for Southern Beirut Suburbs
events.description_en: The IDF issued an urgent evacuation notice to residents of southern Beirut suburbs ahead of planned strikes. Israeli Air Force aircraft continued to strike Hezbollah infrastructure across the Dahiyeh area and in multiple locations in southern Lebanon and the Beqaa Valley. The evacuation notice indicated an intensification of planned strike activity in the area.
events.description_ko: IDF Issues Evacuation Notice for Southern Beirut Suburbs. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Intercepted Missile Shrapnel Strikes Old City of Jerusalem
events.description_en: Shrapnel from an Iranian missile intercepted by Israeli air defenses fell in the Old City of Jerusalem, causing material damage. The incident, while not a direct missile impact on the site, raised immediate concerns given the political and religious sensitivity of the location. IDF confirmed the missile was intercepted before reaching its intended target. The Home Front Command tightened restrictions across southern Israel following the day's barrage activity.
events.description_ko: Intercepted Missile Shrapnel Strikes Old City of Jerusalem. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IAF Launches Large-Scale Strikes on Tehran Weapons Production Facilities
events.description_en: The Israeli Air Force conducted a large-scale strike package against Tehran, with 60 IAF fighter jets dropping more than 150 bombs on Iranian weapons production facilities. Targets included sites near Tehran and in central Iran. In a wave of strikes in Isfahan overnight, the IDF bombed several weapon manufacturing sites, including one belonging to the IRGC Quds Force and a facility used to manufacture air defense systems. In the Parchin area east of Tehran, the IDF bombed what it described as "Iran's most central facility for the production of missiles and defense systems." US B-2 bombers were also involved in overnight operations.
events.description_ko: IAF Launches Large-Scale Strikes on Tehran Weapons Production Facilities. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Two Ballistic Missiles Fired Toward Diego Garcia; Both Fail to Strike Base
events.description_en: The Wall Street Journal, citing US officials, reported that two ballistic missiles were fired toward Diego Garcia â the joint US-UK military base in the Indian Ocean approximately 4,000 kilometres from Iran. UK Defence Secretary John Healey confirmed to Parliament that two missiles were launched in the direction of the base: one malfunctioned mid-flight, the other was brought down short of its target by a US warship SM-3 interceptor. Neither got close to Diego Garcia. Iran's Foreign Ministry denied responsibility, calling the allegations "disinformation." NATO Secretary-General Mark Rutte said the alliance could not confirm Israel's claim that the missiles were Iranian intercontinental ballistic missiles. The incident indicated Iran may have exceeded its self-imposed 2,000-kilometre range limit.
events.description_ko: Two Ballistic Missiles Fired Toward Diego Garcia; Both Fail to Strike Base. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Iranian Ballistic Missiles Strike Dimona and Arad; Over 100 Injured
events.description_en: Iranian ballistic missiles penetrated Israeli air defenses and struck the southern cities of Dimona and Arad. The Israeli military confirmed its defenses were unable to intercept the incoming rounds. Israel's rescue services reported four people seriously injured, including a 4-year-old girl, and 29 lightly injured in Arad. Combined casualty figures across both cities exceeded 100 injured. The strikes marked the first time in the conflict that an Iranian missile directly impacted a city adjacent to the Shimon Peres Negev Nuclear Research Centre, located approximately 13 kilometres southeast of Dimona. The IAEA stated it was aware of the impact reports and confirmed no indication of damage to the nuclear research centre. Israeli PM Netanyahu described it as "a very difficult evening in the battle for our future."
events.description_ko: 이란 탄도미사일이 이스라엘 방공망을 뚫고 디모나·아라드 시를 직격, 4세 어린이를 포함한 100명 이상이 부상을 입었다. 시몬 페레스 네게브 핵연구소 인근 최초 직격이다.

events.title_en: IDF Chief Zamir Says Campaign at Halfway Stage; Approves Overnight Strikes
events.title_ko: IDF 참모총장, 이란 작전 절반 완료
events.description_en: IDF Chief of Staff Lt. Gen. Eyal Zamir held an assessment with senior officers following the Iranian missile impacts in Dimona and Arad and approved upcoming strikes "across all fronts." Zamir issued a video statement saying that the Diego Garcia missiles "were not intended to hit Israel" and that their range extended to European capitals. He described the overall Iran campaign as at its "halfway stage." CENTCOM commander Admiral Brad Cooper separately stated that US forces had dropped multiple 5,000-pound bombs on an underground facility along Iran's coast used to store anti-ship missiles.
events.description_ko: IDF Chief Zamir Says Campaign at Halfway Stage; Approves Overnight Strikes. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IRGC Says It Targeted Israeli Military and Security Sites in Southern Israel
events.title_ko: IRGC, 이스라엘 남부 군사·보안 시설 타격 주장
events.description_en: The IRGC stated that it had targeted Israeli military installations and security centres in the cities of Arad, Dimona, Eilat, Beersheba, and Kiryat Gat in its most recent missile salvo. Tehran claimed more than 200 people were killed in the strikes; Israel reported no deaths from the attacks â only injuries. The Iranian military announced it had intercepted a US-Israeli armed drone over Tehran before it could conduct combat operations. Israel denied losing any aircraft.
events.description_ko: IRGC Says It Targeted Israeli Military and Security Sites in Southern Israel. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: UAE Engages 341st Ballistic Missile and Ongoing Drone Attacks
events.description_en: UAE Ministry of Defense reported that air defense systems engaged three ballistic missiles and eight UAVs on this date, bringing the cumulative total since the conflict began to 341 ballistic missiles, 15 cruise missiles, and 1,748 UAVs engaged. UAE, Bahrain, UK, France, and Germany issued a joint statement condemning Iran's attacks on commercial vessels and civilian infrastructure in the Gulf, accusing Iran of the "de facto closure" of the Strait of Hormuz.
events.description_ko: UAE Engages 341st Ballistic Missile and Ongoing Drone Attacks. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Israel Launches New Wave of Strikes on Eastern Tehran
events.description_en: Israel launched a new wave of airstrikes on Tehran following the day's Iranian missile attacks on Dimona and Arad. Explosions were reported in the east of the city. IDF confirmed the strikes targeted Iranian military assets. The Home Front Command tightened restrictions across southern Israel, banning gatherings of more than 50 people in the Negev, Lachish and Dead Sea regions. The Education Ministry announced no classes nationwide the following Monday.
events.description_ko: Israel Launches New Wave of Strikes on Eastern Tehran. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Trump Extends Power Plant Threat; Claims US "Weeks Ahead of Schedule"
events.description_en: US President Donald Trump reiterated the threat to attack Iranian power plants and claimed the US was "weeks ahead of schedule" in its war on Iran. Trump stated Iran's "leadership is gone, their navy and air force are dead, they have absolutely no defense." He claimed Iran wanted to make a deal. Iranian leaders denied negotiating with Washington, with Foreign Minister Araghchi saying Iran was seeking "not a cease-fire, but a complete, comprehensive and lasting end to the war."
events.description_ko: Trump Extends Power Plant Threat; Claims US "Weeks Ahead of Schedule". (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Trump Extends Hormuz Deadline; Backs Away from Immediate Power Plant Strikes
events.title_ko: 트럼프, 호르무즈 기한 연장 발전소 공격 유보
events.description_en: US President Trump backed away from the 48-hour Hormuz ultimatum deadline, giving Iranian leaders until the end of the week to comply with demands to reopen the strait. The extension avoided immediate US strikes on Iranian power infrastructure. Trump maintained that Iran wanted to make a deal but had not yet taken the required actions. Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi said Iran had not closed the strait but had imposed restrictions on vessels belonging to countries involved in attacks against Iran. Iran stated it was willing to ensure safe passage for neutral countries such as Japan.
events.description_ko: Trump Extends Hormuz Deadline; Backs Away from Immediate Power Plant Strikes. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IAF Strikes Strategic Bridges and Hezbollah Infrastructure in Lebanon
events.description_en: Israeli Air Force aircraft struck bridges over the Litani River and Hezbollah infrastructure in southern Lebanon and the Beqaa Valley. The targeting of river crossings continued the coalition's campaign to restrict Hezbollah logistics and isolate its southern Lebanon fighting forces. IDF ground forces simultaneously advanced fortification work along the newly established Litani Security Line.
events.description_ko: IAF Strikes Strategic Bridges and Hezbollah Infrastructure in Lebanon. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Drone Strikes Iraqi National Intelligence Building Near Baghdad Airport
events.title_ko: 드론, 바그다드 공항 인근 이라크 정보청사 공격
events.description_en: A sophisticated drone strike targeted an Iraqi national intelligence building situated near Baghdad International Airport. The attack was attributed to Iranian-aligned militia elements. Iraqi authorities launched an investigation. The incident highlighted the continued threat environment facing Iraqi state institutions from Iran-backed militia networks operating within the country despite the broader conflict dynamics.
events.description_ko: Drone Strikes Iraqi National Intelligence Building Near Baghdad Airport. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Iran Conducts Two Rounds of Missile Strikes Against Central Israel
events.description_en: Iran fired two rounds of missile strikes against central Israel, causing destruction and injuries across multiple locations. Shrapnel was reported in several areas. Hezbollah simultaneously launched rockets from Lebanon toward northern Israel. Bahrain reported attacks on fuel tanks. Two people were injured when a drone struck a residential building in Kuwait. AFP reported explosions in downtown Dubai. The sustained multi-front Iranian offensive continued despite the 90 percent reduction in launch tempo from day one of the conflict.
events.description_ko: Iran Conducts Two Rounds of Missile Strikes Against Central Israel. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IAEA Seeks Emergency Access to Iranian Nuclear Facilities
events.title_ko: IAEA, 이란 핵시설 긴급 접근 요청
events.description_en: IAEA Director General Rafael Grossi stated that the agency was seeking emergency access to Iranian nuclear facilities amid the coalition strikes campaign. US Secretary of State Marco Rubio told a congressional briefing that the US may need to physically secure nuclear material inside Iran, stating "People are going to have to go and get it," without specifying who or when. No confirmed IAEA access to Natanz was reported on this date. IAEA previously confirmed no evidence that nuclear facilities had been hit in the strikes.
events.description_ko: IAEA Seeks Emergency Access to Iranian Nuclear Facilities. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF Engineering Units Advance Litani Security Line Fortifications
events.title_ko: IDF 공병, 리타니 안보선 구축 작업
events.description_en: IDF engineering and infantry units continued systematic work establishing the Litani Security Line fortifications in southern Lebanon. Combat engineering elements cleared terrain and began initial fortification construction along the buffer zone. Isolated Hezbollah cells continued to fire anti-tank missiles and rockets at IDF forces operating in the area. IDF confirmed ongoing operations against Hezbollah positions throughout the day.
events.description_ko: IDF Engineering Units Advance Litani Security Line Fortifications. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Pentagon Requests Additional Defense Appropriations as Conflict Enters Fourth Week
events.title_ko: 미 국방부, 추가 전쟁 예산 의회 요청
events.description_en: US defense officials requested additional congressional appropriations to sustain ongoing military operations in the Middle East as the conflict entered its fourth week. The request covered munitions replenishment, operational costs, and repositioning of forces. Congress was briefed on the state of the campaign, with officials noting that the conflict was proceeding ahead of schedule on military objectives while diplomatic channels remained active through Pakistani and Omani intermediaries.
events.description_ko: Pentagon Requests Additional Defense Appropriations as Conflict Enters Fourth Week. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Isolated Hezbollah Cell Fires Rockets at Northern Israeli Communities
events.title_ko: 헤즈볼라 잔존 세력, 북부 이스라엘 로켓 발사
events.description_en: An isolated Hezbollah cell operating in the rugged terrain of northern Lebanon fired a rocket barrage at northern Israeli communities. Magen David Adom treated several people for injuries. The incident confirmed that despite the IDF's systematic operations, dispersed Hezbollah cells retained operational capability and continued to impose friction on northern Israeli communities independent of central Hezbollah command direction.
events.description_ko: Isolated Hezbollah Cell Fires Rockets at Northern Israeli Communities. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: US Navy Strikes IRGC Navy Fast-Attack Craft in Strait of Hormuz
events.title_ko: 미 해군, 호르무즈 IRGC 고속정 타격
events.description_en: US Navy MH-60R Seahawk helicopters and F/A-18 Super Hornets struck IRGC Navy fast-attack craft that were harassing commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. CENTCOM confirmed the strikes on Iranian naval assets and coastal facilities. US Admiral Brad Cooper issued a statement urging every Iranian serving in the IRGC Navy to "abandon their post and return home to avoid further risk of unnecessary injury or death."
events.description_ko: US Navy Strikes IRGC Navy Fast-Attack Craft in Strait of Hormuz. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Pentagon Orders 82nd Airborne Division to Deploy to Middle East
events.description_en: The United States Department of Defense issued deployment orders for 2,000 to 3,000 soldiers from the 82nd Airborne Division's Immediate Response Force to move to the CENTCOM area of responsibility. Maj. Gen. Brandon Tegtmeier, commander of the 82nd Airborne Division, and division headquarters staff were included in the deployment order. The 82nd Airborne serves as the US Army's rapid reaction force, capable of deploying anywhere in the world within 18 hours. US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth confirmed CENTCOM had requested the reinforcements to expand operational options.
events.description_ko: Pentagon Orders 82nd Airborne Division to Deploy to Middle East. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: CENTCOM Confirms 50,000 US Troops in Middle East; USS Tripoli Deploying
events.description_en: US Central Command confirmed that more than 50,000 US troops were now present in the Middle East, including two aircraft carriers, 200 combat aircraft, and thousands of arriving forces including the 82nd Airborne and Marine Expeditionary Units. The USS Tripoli, an America-class amphibious assault ship carrying 2,200 Marines of the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit, was transiting toward the region after departing Sasebo, Japan on March 13. A second group, the USS Boxer carrying 2,500 Marines of the 11th MEU, was also en route from San Diego.
events.description_ko: CENTCOM Confirms 50,000 US Troops in Middle East; USS Tripoli Deploying. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Coalition Continues Deep Strike Campaign Against Iranian Weapon Production
events.description_en: Coalition aircraft continued strikes on Iranian weapons production and storage infrastructure across multiple provinces. IDF Spokesman Brig. Gen. Effie Defrin confirmed the military had hit more than 1,000 targets of Iran's weapon production industries since the start of the war. Targets included factories producing missiles, drones, and defense systems.
events.description_ko: Coalition Continues Deep Strike Campaign Against Iranian Weapon Production. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Pakistan Confirms Role as US-Iran Intermediary; 15-Point Framework Transmitted
events.title_ko: 파키스탄, 미-이란 중재·15개항 제안 전달 확인
events.description_en: Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif publicly confirmed Pakistan was facilitating diplomatic outreach between the US and Iran. Two Pakistani officials told the Associated Press that Iran had received a 15-point US proposal to end the war, transmitted through Pakistan as intermediary. Trump said the US and Iran had reached 15 points of agreement and that Iran would "very much" like to make a deal. Iranian officials continued to deny that formal negotiations were occurring, with military spokesperson Lt. Col. Zolfaghari stating there were no talks between the US and Iran.
events.description_ko: 파키스탄 샤리프 총리가 미국의 15개항 종전 제안을 이란에 전달했음을 공식 확인했다. 트럼프는 이란이 협상을 원한다고 주장했으나 이란은 협상 자체를 부인했다.

events.title_en: Iran and Hezbollah Maintain Missile and Rocket Pressure on Israel
events.description_en: Iranian forces continued to fire missiles at Israel, while Hezbollah maintained rocket pressure on northern communities. IDF air defenses engaged incoming fire across multiple vectors. The continued operational tempo demonstrated that Iranian and Hezbollah strike capability, while significantly degraded from the conflict's opening days, remained active. US interceptor stockpile consumption was cited by the Atlantic Council as an emerging operational concern.
events.description_ko: Iran and Hezbollah Maintain Missile and Rocket Pressure on Israel. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: US Forces Strike Iran-Backed Militia Assets in Iraq
events.title_ko: 미군, 이라크 이란 민병대 자산 타격
events.description_en: US forces conducted strikes against Iran-backed militia assets in Iraq in response to militia attacks on US personnel and facilities. Iraqi Counter-Terrorism Service forces were reportedly conducting parallel internal security operations against militia networks in Babil Province. The Iraqi government navigated an increasingly difficult position between its obligations to the US-led coalition and domestic political pressure from Iran-aligned factions.
events.description_ko: US Forces Strike Iran-Backed Militia Assets in Iraq. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Iran Sets Five Conditions for Ending War; Rejects US Framing of Negotiations
events.description_en: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi outlined five Iranian conditions for ending the conflict: end to aggression, concrete guarantees preventing recurrence of war, guaranteed war damage compensation, comprehensive ceasefire across all fronts including proxy groups, and recognition of Iranian sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz. Iran rejected US characterizations of the diplomatic outreach as "negotiations," insisting there was only an "exchange of messages." Araghchi said Tehran would continue to "resist."
events.description_ko: Iran Sets Five Conditions for Ending War; Rejects US Framing of Negotiations. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: USAF Strikes IRGC Mobile Missile Launchers in Central Iran
events.title_ko: 미 공군, 이란 중부 이동식 발사대 타격
events.description_en: United States Air Force aircraft executed strikes against IRGC mobile missile transporter-erector-launchers (TELs) that had been tracked attempting to reposition in central Iran. CENTCOM confirmed that US and coalition forces had degraded approximately two-thirds of Iran's missile and drone production facilities since the conflict began. The TEL hunting missions focused on preventing rogue IRGC units from reconstituting ballistic missile launch capability.
events.description_ko: USAF Strikes IRGC Mobile Missile Launchers in Central Iran. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF Combat Engineers Neutralize IED Complex in Dahiyeh Clearing Operations
events.title_ko: IDF 공병, 다히예 IED 제거 작전
events.description_en: Block-by-block clearing operations in the Dahiyeh suburb continued, with IDF Combat Engineering units engaging improvised explosive device networks and booby-trapped buildings left behind by Hezbollah. Isolated Hezbollah holdout cells fired anti-tank guided missiles at IDF engineering patrols, causing casualties. IDF continued systematic demolition of Hezbollah infrastructure throughout the day.
