events.description_ko: IDF Combat Engineers Neutralize IED Complex in Dahiyeh Clearing Operations. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: 82nd Airborne Leadership Ordered to Middle East as Ground Options Expand
events.title_ko: 82공정사단 사령부 중동 파견 지상전 옵션 확대
events.description_en: The Intercept and multiple news organizations confirmed that Maj. Gen. Brandon Tegtmeier, commander of the 82nd Airborne Division, and his headquarters staff had been ordered to the Middle East. The deployment of division-level command architecture alongside the two Marine Expeditionary Units already en route created a significant expeditionary ground force command capability. US Secretary of State Rubio told Congress that the US may need to physically secure nuclear material inside Iran.
events.description_ko: 82nd Airborne Leadership Ordered to Middle East as Ground Options Expand. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: US Coyote Interceptors Defeat Militia Drone Attack at Al-Tanf Garrison
events.description_en: Forward-deployed US military personnel at the Al-Tanf garrison in southeastern Syria successfully repelled a coordinated drone attack by Iran-aligned militia elements using Coyote counter-UAS interceptors and other air defense systems. No US casualties were reported. The Al-Tanf garrison remained a persistent target for Iran-backed Iraqi militia groups throughout the conflict.
events.description_ko: US Coyote Interceptors Defeat Militia Drone Attack at Al-Tanf Garrison. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Artesh Forces Engage IRGC Holdouts Near Isfahan Military Facilities
events.description_en: Reports indicated Artesh mechanized units conducted operations against IRGC holdout elements near Isfahan military and aerospace facilities. The internal Iranian security dynamic between Artesh and hardline IRGC units continued to generate friction at key installations. These reports were not officially confirmed by Iranian government sources.
events.description_ko: Artesh Forces Engage IRGC Holdouts Near Isfahan Military Facilities. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: US Navy Strikes Houthi Coastal Defense Site in Gulf of Aden
events.title_ko: 미 해군, 아덴만 후티 해안포대 타격
events.description_en: US Navy aircraft from the USS Theodore Roosevelt Carrier Strike Group executed strikes against Houthi coastal defense batteries in Yemen. The strikes targeted systems that posed a threat to commercial shipping in the Gulf of Aden and surrounding waters. Houthi military activity had been significantly reduced from the conflict's opening days but isolated attack capability was demonstrated through occasional USV and missile launches.
events.description_ko: US Navy Strikes Houthi Coastal Defense Site in Gulf of Aden. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Iraqi Counter-Terrorism Service Raids Kata'ib Hezbollah Drone Facility
events.title_ko: 이라크 대테러부대, 카타이브 드론 시설 급습
events.description_en: Iraq's elite Counter-Terrorism Service conducted raids targeting Kata'ib Hezbollah drone manufacturing infrastructure in Babil Province, south of Baghdad. The operations reflected the Iraqi government's attempt to demonstrate state sovereignty and avoid further devastating US retaliatory strikes on Iraqi soil. The Iraqi PM had previously called on Iran-backed militia groups to stand down.
events.description_ko: Iraqi Counter-Terrorism Service Raids Kata'ib Hezbollah Drone Facility. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: EU Accuses Russia of Providing Intelligence Support to Iran Against US Forces
events.title_ko: EU, 러시아 이란 정보지원 공개 비난
events.description_en: EU foreign policy chief Kaja Kallas publicly accused Russia of providing intelligence support to Iran to help target American forces. Kallas stated: "We see that Russia is helping Iran with intelligence to target Americans, to kill Americans, and Russia is also supporting Iran now with the drones so that they can attack neighbouring countries and also US military bases." The statement represented the most direct European accusation of Russian material support for Iran during the conflict.
events.description_ko: EU Accuses Russia of Providing Intelligence Support to Iran Against US Forces. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IAEA Monitoring Teams Expand Access to Iranian Nuclear Facilities
events.description_en: IAEA monitoring teams continued to expand access to Iranian nuclear sites under Artesh military escort. The access came following US Secretary of State Rubio's statement that the US was considering how to ensure Iranian nuclear material is physically secured. The IAEA had previously confirmed Iran entered 2026 with approximately 440 kilograms of uranium enriched to 60 percent purity â sufficient for multiple nuclear weapons if further enriched. No confirmed removal or exfiltration of this material was officially reported on this date. The IAEA continued to act as the primary international monitoring body.
events.description_ko: IAEA Monitoring Teams Expand Access to Iranian Nuclear Facilities. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Reports: Artesh Forces Engage IRGCN Holdouts Near Bandar Abbas Naval Complex
events.title_ko: 아르테시, 반다르아바스 IRGC 잔류 세력 교전
events.description_en: Unconfirmed reports indicated Artesh forces conducted operations against IRGC Navy holdout elements near the Bandar Abbas naval complex. The Bandar Abbas naval base is Iran's primary Persian Gulf naval facility and its control is critical to the security of the Strait of Hormuz. These reports have not been officially confirmed by the Iranian government or CENTCOM and should be treated as preliminary.
events.description_ko: Reports: Artesh Forces Engage IRGCN Holdouts Near Bandar Abbas Naval Complex. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF Completes Final Major Demolition Operations in Dahiyeh
events.title_ko: IDF, 다히예 최종 대규모 철거 완료
events.description_en: IDF Combat Engineering Corps (Yahalom) units completed the final major controlled demolition phase targeting Hezbollah subterranean command infrastructure beneath the Dahiyeh suburb of Beirut. The operations marked the conclusion of the high-intensity demolition phase within the Lebanese capital. IDF operational posture began shifting toward consolidating and fortifying the Litani Security Line in southern Lebanon, with engineering units beginning fortification construction at key terrain features.
events.description_ko: IDF Completes Final Major Demolition Operations in Dahiyeh. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: US Patriot Battery Intercepts Militia Ballistic Missile Over Erbil
events.title_ko: 패트리엇, 에르빌 상공 민병대 탄도탄 요격
events.description_en: US Army Patriot PAC-3 missile defense batteries at Harir Air Base in Kurdistan intercepted a short-range ballistic missile attributed to an Iran-aligned militia group operating from central Iraq. The successful interception prevented impact on coalition aviation infrastructure at the base. Iran-backed Iraqi militia groups continued to conduct periodic missile and rocket attacks on coalition positions despite the broader strategic context of the conflict.
events.description_ko: US Patriot Battery Intercepts Militia Ballistic Missile Over Erbil. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Iraqi CTS Expands Raids Against Kata'ib Hezbollah in Babil Province
events.title_ko: 이라크 CTS, 바빌주 카타이브 소탕 확대
events.description_en: Iraqi Counter-Terrorism Service units expanded operations against Kata'ib Hezbollah infrastructure in Babil Province. Operations targeted drone manufacturing facilities, weapons caches, and command nodes. The Iraqi government framed the operations as an assertion of state sovereignty and an effort to prevent further US retaliatory strikes on Iraqi territory. The raids reflected the complex dynamics of Iraqi domestic politics amid the broader regional conflict.
events.description_ko: Iraqi CTS Expands Raids Against Kata'ib Hezbollah in Babil Province. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: US Navy Strikes Houthi Coastal Defense Battery in Red Sea Area
events.title_ko: 미 해군, 홍해 후티 해안포대 타격
events.description_en: US Navy aircraft from the Theodore Roosevelt Carrier Strike Group conducted preemptive strikes against a Houthi coastal defense battery that was preparing to engage commercial shipping. The strikes were consistent with the ongoing maritime security campaign to maintain freedom of navigation in the Red Sea and Gulf of Aden. Houthi operational capability had been significantly reduced over the course of the conflict but isolated launch capability persisted.
events.description_ko: US Navy Strikes Houthi Coastal Defense Battery in Red Sea Area. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF Strikes Hezbollah Infrastructure Along Litani Security Line
events.title_ko: IDF, 리타니 안보선 헤즈볼라 인프라 타격
events.description_en: IDF aircraft conducted strikes against Hezbollah positions in southern Lebanon as engineering units continued Litani Security Line fortification work. Isolated Hezbollah cells fired anti-tank guided missiles at IDF engineering patrols operating in the buffer zone. An IDF soldier was killed in Lebanon on this date. IDF confirmed the strikes were targeting Hezbollah assets that posed a threat to forces constructing the security line.
events.description_ko: IDF Strikes Hezbollah Infrastructure Along Litani Security Line. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: US-Iran Diplomatic Track Continues Through Pakistani Intermediary
events.description_en: Diplomatic activity continued through Pakistani intermediary channels. Pakistan had confirmed the transmission of a 15-point US framework to Iranian leadership. Iranian officials continued to publicly deny formal negotiations were occurring while simultaneously indicating willingness to listen to proposals through intermediaries. NPR reported that Israeli officials wanted to continue fighting for several more weeks and that Israel was accelerating targeting of Iranian arms factories in anticipation of a potential ceasefire.
events.description_ko: US-Iran Diplomatic Track Continues Through Pakistani Intermediary. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: White House Confirms 90% Degradation of Iranian Ballistic Missile Launch Rate
events.title_ko: 백악관, 이란 탄도미사일 발사율 90% 감소 확인
events.description_en: White House and CENTCOM confirmed that Iran's ballistic missile launch rate had fallen 90 percent from day one of the war, and drone launch rates had fallen 83 percent. IDF Spokesman Brig. Gen. Effie Defrin confirmed the military had hit more than 1,000 targets of Iran's weapon production industries. CENTCOM confirmed it had degraded approximately two-thirds of Iran's missile and drone production facilities. The US confirmed the deployment of the 82nd Airborne Division, supplementing approximately 50,000 US troops already in the Middle East alongside two aircraft carriers and 200 combat aircraft.
events.description_ko: White House Confirms 90% Degradation of Iranian Ballistic Missile Launch Rate. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Israel Kills IRGC Navy Commander Alireza Tangsiri in Bandar Abbas Strike
events.title_ko: 이스라엘, IRGC 해군 사령관 탕시리 제거
events.description_en: An Israeli airstrike killed IRGC Navy commander Admiral Alireza Tangsiri in Bandar Abbas. Tangsiri was the key figure behind the near-total blockade of the Strait of Hormuz since the conflict began. CENTCOM Admiral Brad Cooper issued a statement saying the killing "makes the region safer" and urged every IRGC Navy member to "abandon their post and return home." IDF Spokesman Defrin stated: "The eliminations will not stop; we will continue to pursue anyone who threatens Israel."
events.description_ko: 이스라엘 공습으로 IRGC 해군 사령관 알리레자 탕시리 제독이 반다르아바스에서 제거됐다. 그는 호르무즈 해협 봉쇄의 핵심 인물이었다.

events.title_en: IAF Conducts Extensive Strikes on Isfahan and Parchin Weapons Facilities
events.description_en: The Israeli Air Force carried out several waves of airstrikes across Iran, targeting dozens of Iranian weapon production facilities. According to the IDF, 60 IAF fighter jets dropped more than 150 bombs on facilities near Tehran and in central Iran. In Isfahan, the IDF bombed weapon manufacturing sites including a facility belonging to the IRGC Quds Force and a facility manufacturing air defense systems. In the Parchin area east of Tehran, the IDF struck what it described as "the Iranian regime's most central facility for the production of missiles and defense systems," including a plant for casting and filling warheads.
events.description_ko: IAF Conducts Extensive Strikes on Isfahan and Parchin Weapons Facilities. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Iran Strikes Gulf States as Iraq Suffers Militia Drone Attacks
events.title_ko: 이란, 걸프 공격 지속·이라크 민병대 드론
events.description_en: Iran conducted ongoing missile and drone attacks against Gulf Cooperation Council states and US military facilities. Iranian parliament representatives continued pressing for formal legislation codifying sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz and a toll collection mechanism. Approximately 2,000 vessels and 20,000 seafarers remained stranded in the Strait. France's military chief announced plans to facilitate restoration of maritime navigation through diplomatic discussions.
events.description_ko: Iran Strikes Gulf States as Iraq Suffers Militia Drone Attacks. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Hezbollah Rocket Strike Kills One Civilian in Nahariya; IDF Responds
events.description_en: Hezbollah launched a barrage of approximately 20 rockets toward Haifa and the Galilee, triggering sirens across the region. A rocket struck Nahariya, killing a man in his 30s and injuring four others including a man in his 50s in moderate-to-serious condition from shrapnel. IDF launched a wave of airstrikes against Hezbollah infrastructure sites in southern Lebanon in response. Most of the incoming rockets were intercepted, with others hitting open areas.
events.description_ko: Hezbollah Rocket Strike Kills One Civilian in Nahariya; IDF Responds. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Trump Says He Does Not Care About Reaching a Deal With Iran
events.title_ko: 트럼프, 이란 협상 관심 없다 발언
events.description_en: US President Donald Trump said he does not care about making a deal with Iran and that the US had additional targets to hit before leaving. "I don't know if we're willing to do that," Trump said of deal-making. Iranian media reported Iran had "complete doubt" about Washington's willingness to negotiate. Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi said Tehran wants to end the war on "its own terms." The diplomatic track through Pakistan remained active but produced no confirmed framework agreement.
events.description_ko: Trump Says He Does Not Care About Reaching a Deal With Iran. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: US-Iran Back-Channel Dialogue Continues Through Pakistani Intermediary
events.description_en: US-Iran diplomatic back-channel activity continued through Pakistani intermediaries. Iran had responded through unnamed intermediaries to the 15-point US plan and was awaiting Washington's reply, according to Iran's Tasnim news agency. The exact contents of the US plan had not been made public. Pakistani Prime Minister Sharif continued to facilitate. Iran described the US proposal as "maximalist." Both sides maintained public positions while back-channel activity proceeded.
events.description_ko: US-Iran Back-Channel Dialogue Continues Through Pakistani Intermediary. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IDF reported 4 missile salvos were fired from Iran on targets in Israel since the early morning, with most being intercepted and the rest causing no c
events.description_en: Israel's military said its overnight attacks targeted sites "in the heart of Tehran" where ballistic missiles and weapons are produced. IDF also struck missile launchers and storage sites in western Iran. An AFP journalist in Tehran reported approximately 10 intense blasts and a plume of black smoke. Search and rescue teams operated at a residential building hit in the Ray district south of Tehran, with at least five people killed according to local officials. The Israeli military said the strikes targeted "missile production capabilities, infrastructure remaining from Iran's nuclear program, and terror regime targets."
events.description_ko: IDF reported 4 missile salvos were fired from Iran on targets in Israel since the early morning, with most being intercepted and the rest causing no c. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Kuwait reported an attack by drones on Shuwaikh Port , and drones and missiles on Mubarak Al Kabeer Port causing material damage but no human casualti
events.description_en: Kuwait's Public Works Ministry confirmed that the Mubarak Al-Kabeer Port in southern Kuwait was struck in a combined drone and cruise missile attack, marking the second Kuwaiti port to be targeted within the same operational day. The attack followed earlier damage to Shuwaikh Port. Mubarak Al-Kabeer Port is under active construction as part of China's Belt and Road Initiative â making this one of the first confirmed strikes on a Chinese-affiliated infrastructure project of the conflict. China has continued purchasing Iranian crude throughout the war. The sustained targeting of Kuwaiti maritime infrastructure highlights Iran's strategy of imposing logistical costs on Gulf states that have permitted coalition operations from their territory.
events.description_ko: Kuwait reported an attack by drones on Shuwaikh Port , and drones and missiles on Mubarak Al Kabeer Port causing material damage but no human casualti. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: UAE authorities reported six ballistic missiles and nine drones from Iran were intercepted.
events.description_en: Iran fired two rounds of ballistic missile strikes against central Israel, causing destruction and injuries in multiple locations including the Kfar Qasim area. IDF air defenses engaged the incoming fire. Magen David Adom treated injured civilians across the impacted areas. The strikes demonstrated continued Iranian offensive capability despite the 90 percent reduction in launch tempo from day one. The IRGC stated the strikes targeted Israeli military and security sites.
events.description_ko: UAE authorities reported six ballistic missiles and nine drones from Iran were intercepted.. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_ko: 이란, 프린스 술탄 기지 미사일·드론 타격
events.description_en: An Iranian missile and drone attack on Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia wounded at least 10 US service members and damaged several US refueling aircraft, a US official told AP and CBS News. It was not immediately clear how many troops were wounded or how severely. CENTCOM separately disclosed that 303 US troops had been wounded and 13 killed since the start of the conflict on February 28. The IRGC Aerospace Force commander warned that retaliation for the nuclear facility strikes would exceed previous exchanges: "This time, the equation will no longer be an eye for an eye."

events.description_en: The Israeli Air Force executed an airstrike in Beirut during the pre-dawn hours. Smoke was observed rising over the Lebanese capital. Lebanon's Health Ministry officially reported two fatalities. IDF confirmed ongoing operations targeting Hezbollah infrastructure in the Lebanese capital.

events.title_en: Israel Strikes Shahid Khondab Heavy Water Complex in Arak
events.description_en: Following IDF evacuation warnings, coalition aircraft struck the Shahid Khondab Heavy Water Complex in Arak, Markazi Province. The complex had previously been targeted during the June 2025 conflict. A Markazi Province official confirmed it was hit in two stages with no human casualties. Iran's Atomic Energy Organization confirmed the strike. No radiation release was reported. Israel described the strikes as targeting infrastructure remaining from Iran's nuclear program.
events.description_ko: Israel Strikes Shahid Khondab Heavy Water Complex in Arak. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: IAF Strikes Ardakan Yellowcake Production Plant; No Radiation Release Reported
events.description_en: Coalition aircraft struck the Ardakan yellowcake production plant in Yazd Province. Iran's Atomic Energy Organization confirmed the strike on the facility, which became operational in 2023, stating "initial assessments indicate that this incident has not resulted in any release of radioactive materials outside the facility." The Israeli military later stated raw materials are processed for enrichment at the Yazd plant and described the strike as "a major blow to Iran's nuclear program." Yellowcake is a uranium concentrate powder and an early step in the nuclear fuel cycle before enrichment.
events.description_ko: IAF Strikes Ardakan Yellowcake Production Plant; No Radiation Release Reported. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Iranian Attacks Damage Kuwait Ports Including Chinese Belt and Road Facility
events.title_ko: 이란, 쿠웨이트 항구 공격 중국 일대일로 시설 피해
events.description_en: Kuwait reported that Shuwaikh Port in Kuwait City and the Mubarak Al Kabeer Port to the north sustained material damage in Iranian attacks. The Mubarak Al Kabeer facility is under active construction as part of China's Belt and Road Initiative, making it what appeared to be the first Chinese-affiliated infrastructure project struck in the conflict. Kuwait Ports Authority confirmed Shuwaikh Port "was subjected to an attack by hostile drones with no human casualties." China has continued to purchase Iranian crude throughout the war.
events.description_ko: Iranian Attacks Damage Kuwait Ports Including Chinese Belt and Road Facility. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: G7 Foreign Ministers Issue Joint Statement on Hormuz; Trump Extends Deadline to April 6
events.title_ko: G7 외교장관, 호르무즈 공동성명·트럼프 기한 연장
events.description_en: G7 foreign ministers meeting in Vaux-de-Cernay, France â including US Secretary of State Marco Rubio â issued a joint statement calling for "immediate cessation of attacks against civilians and civilian infrastructures" and restoration of "safe and toll free freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz." Rubio warned Iran may attempt to establish a formal toll system in the strait. Separately, Trump posted on Truth Social extending the Hormuz deadline by 10 days to April 6, stating "talks are ongoing and going very well." Iran blocked two Chinese container ships from entering the Strait of Hormuz on this date despite earlier assurances of safe passage for neutral shipping.
events.description_ko: G7 Foreign Ministers Issue Joint Statement on Hormuz; Trump Extends Deadline to April 6. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: Saudi Air Defenses Intercept Missiles and Drones Targeting Riyadh
events.description_en: Royal Saudi Air Defense Forces intercepted missiles and drones targeting the Saudi capital Riyadh. Saudi Arabia's Defense Ministry confirmed the interceptions. Kuwait and Bahrain also reported attacks. The Saudi government issued a public statement: "Our primary concern today is to defend ourselves from the daily attacks on our people and our civilian infrastructure. Iran has chosen dangerous brinkmanship over serious diplomatic solutions."
events.description_ko: Saudi Air Defenses Intercept Missiles and Drones Targeting Riyadh. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: A Houthi ballistic missile was launched from Yemen toward Beersheba in Southern Israel after its military spokesman gave a speech.[ 5
events.title_ko: 후티, 예멘서 브에르셰바 향해 탄도미사일 발사
events.description_en: Yemen's Houthi rebels formally entered Operation Epic Fury on its one-month anniversary, launching their first ballistic missile attacks against Israel since the US-Israeli war began. Houthi military spokesman Brigadier-General Yahya Saree confirmed the attacks on the group's Al-Masirah satellite television, stating the strikes targeted "sensitive Israeli military sites" in southern Israel. Air raid sirens sounded across Beersheba and the area near Israel's main nuclear research center. The IDF confirmed missile launches from Yemen and stated that aerial defense systems had intercepted the threats. A second Houthi wave followed hours later, with Saree confirming responsibility and vowing operations would "continue until the declared objectives are achieved." The entry of the Houthis opened the possibility of renewed attacks on Red Sea shipping through the Bab al-Mandeb Strait â a chokepoint through which approximately $1 trillion in annual trade passes. Houthi deputy information minister Mohammed Mansour stated that "closing the Bab al-Mandab strait is among our options."
events.description_ko: A Houthi ballistic missile was launched from Yemen toward Beersheba in Southern Israel after its military spokesman gave a speech.[ 5. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: The IDF said that it struck the headquarters of the Marine Industries Organization in Tehran alongside other arms manufacturing sites and air defenses
events.description_en: The combined US-Israeli force conducted precision strikes in Tehran targeting two facilities. The Marine Industries Organization (MIO), which oversees Iran's naval weapons systems including missile-equipped fast boats and drone vessels critical to the Hormuz blockade, sustained direct hits. A second strike targeted the Physics Department of Iran's University of Science and Technology (IUST), a facility assessed by Western intelligence agencies as linked to nuclear and ballistic missile research programs. The IDF described the strikes as targeting Iran's capacity to sustain offensive naval and ballistic operations. No casualty figures were released for either site.
events.description_ko: The IDF said that it struck the headquarters of the Marine Industries Organization in Tehran alongside other arms manufacturing sites and air defenses. (설명 원문 참조)

events.title_en: An Iranian attack struck Emirates Global Aluminium 's Al Taweelah site in Abu Dhabi, causing damage.Aluminium Bahrain also announced
events.description_en: Iranian forces launched retaliatory strikes against Gulf industrial targets, hitting Aluminium Bahrain (Alba) â one of the world's largest aluminium smelters â and Emirates Global Aluminium. The IRGC stated the strikes were a direct response to prior US-Israeli attacks on two major Iranian steel plants. The attacks caused material damage at both facilities and injured two workers. The strikes underscored Iran's expanding targeting logic, moving from military and energy infrastructure toward the broader industrial base of GCC states that have not condemned the coalition campaign. Alba operates one of the largest smelting operations in the world outside China.

Both were assessed as responsible for coordinating Hezbollah's battlefield communications infrastructure in the southern theater. A separate IDF strike on a vehicle killed three journalists working for Hezbollah-affiliated media outlets; the IDF stated one was a confirmed member of the Radwan Force elite unit operating under journalistic cover. The World Health Organization separately confirmed that nine paramedics were killed and seven wounded in five distinct Israeli attacks on medical personnel in southern Lebanon during the day, marking one of the highest single-day tolls for healthcare workers in the Lebanese theater.

events.description_en: US Central Command confirmed the deployment of approximately 4,500 Marines and sailors from the Tripoli Amphibious Ready Group to the Middle East theater, with speculation mounting that the force may be assigned to operations around Kharg Island or maritime chokepoint security. Simultaneously, CENTCOM officially disclosed the war's US casualty toll for the first time: 303 service members wounded â the majority suffering traumatic brain injuries from Iranian ballistic missile strikes on Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia â and 13 killed in action since the conflict began on February 28. Sources briefed on the matter told the Associated Press that Iran fired six ballistic missiles and 29 drones at Prince Sultan Air Base in the Friday attack alone, injuring at least 15 troops, including five seriously. The base came under attack twice earlier in the same week.

events.title_en: Coalition Executes Sixth Strike on Deeply Buried Yazd Missile Base
events.title_ko: 연합군, 야즈드 지하 미사일 기지 6번째 타격
events.description_en: The US-Israeli combined force executed another bunker-buster strike on the Yazd Missile Base, a deeply buried underground complex with extensive tunnel networks in central Iran. The strike followed OSINT reporting and video evidence confirming Iranian ballistic missiles had been launched from the facility during recent attack cycles. This marks at least the sixth time the base has been targeted since the war began, reflecting the coalition's sustained campaign to degrade Iran's mobile and hardened launch infrastructure. The Yazd Missile Base is assessed as housing medium- and intermediate-range ballistic missile systems capable of reaching Israel and Gulf state targets.
events.description_ko: Coalition Executes Sixth Strike on Deeply Buried Yazd Missile Base. (설명 원문 참조)
